raw_text: Featured Benefits Item 1 of 6 Enjoy all the benefits to make travel go the extra mile. You can receive one $100 Annual Travel Credit to redeem for bookings through American Express Travel Online. 28 Get airport lounge access to start relaxing early. Enjoy four (4) complimentary visits per calendar year to Plaza Premium Lounges 38 across Canada. Entry fees apply once complimentary visits have been used. Gold or Rose Gold: you get to choose. Your American Express ® Gold Rewards Card is made with 13g stainless steel metal. Available in your choice of Gold or Rose Gold. Get travel benefits for the adventures ahead of you. You can receive a $50 CAD statement credit when a NEXUS ◊ application or renewal fee is charged to your American Express ® Gold Rewards Card. 39 Travel with points using the Flexible Points Travel Program. Redeem for travel booked through American Express Travel Services or at americanexpress.ca/travel . Pay with your Card, points or a combination of both! 8 Up to $120 in statement credits with Instacart​ Enjoy groceries and more delivered with Instacart and earn up to $120 in statement credits within a 12 month period until December 31, 2027. 43 axp-glyph-left Slide 1 of 6 Currently Selected Slide Slide 2 of 6 Slide 3 of 6 Slide 4 of 6 Slide 5 of 6 Slide 6 of 6 axp-glyph-right Pay for almost anything with points From groceries and gas to travel and streaming services, you can redeem your Membership Rewards points with Use Points for Purchases to cover eligible Card purchases. Information button icon 1,000 points = $10 for all eligible purchases All Benefits Every point counts with Amex Get more out of life and earn rewards along the way with the Membership Rewards ® program. Book travel with special benefits and offers From an annual travel credit 28 and access to Priority Pass TM lounges worldwide 37 - to car rental privileges and travel offers, make every trip one you look forward to. Travel coverage Road trip or flight, you may be protected when you book travel with your Card. Welcome to Amex Experiences TM Stay connected with all that Amex Experiences TM Experiences has to offer! axp-

card_name: RBC Visa Classic Low Rate Option
raw_text: Card Highlights Enjoy a Consistently Low Interest Rate Get a low, fixed annual interest rate of 12.99% on purchases, cash advances and balance transfers 1 . No surprises. Shop With Confidence Your RBC Visa Classic Low Rate Option card includes purchase security and extended warranty coverage 4 . Access Funds Whenever, Wherever Accepted wherever you see the Visa logo, at more than one million ATMs and 24 million establishments in 170 countries Worldwide. Unlock Exclusive Partner Offers Get special partner offers from brands like Petro Canada, Rexall and DoorDash. How to Use Your Fixed Low Annual Interest Rate Credit Card Balance Your Budget With a low interest rate card, you pay less in interest charges and make your payments more affordable. Fund an Unexpected Purchase Have a safety net for unexpected expenses like car repairs or medical bills, minimizing the interest costs. Consolidate Your Debt Transfer high-interest balances to a low-interest rate card, which can help you save money on interest charges and pay down your balances faster. Exclusive Offers From Brands You Love Save 3¢/L on fuel and earn 20% more Petro-Points when you pay with an eligible linked RBC card 3 Learn More Link your eligible RBC Card and earn 50 Be Well™ points on every $1 spent on eligible purchases at Rexall 5 Learn More Get a 6-month complimentary DashPass subscription – a value of almost $60. Plus, enjoy unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fees on qualifying orders of $15 or more when you pay

raw_text: how to redeem and the current list of More Rewards partner locations, visit morerewards.ca . 2 More Rewards points are earned on net purchases only; they are not earned on cash advances (balance transfers, cash-like transactions and bill payments that are not pre-authorized charges that you set up with a merchant), interest charges or fees. Credits for returns and adjustments will reduce or cancel the points earned by the amounts originally charged. 3 You, as the primary cardholder, will earn 5 More Rewards points for every $1 spent on qualifying purchases at participating More Rewards partner locations, including Save-On-Foods, Quality Foods, Buy-Low Foods, PriceSmart Foods, Urban Fare, Nester Market and Pure Pharmacy, when you pay with your More Rewards RBC Visa credit card that is linked to your More Rewards card number. More Rewards partner locations are listed at morerewards.ca/earn/partners and subject to change from time to time without notice. Purchases at some More Rewards partner locations may not qualify for the higher earn rate if the More Rewards partner is not assigned a unique Merchant ID Number for purposes of payment processing. In addition, online purchases made with your More Rewards RBC Visa credit card at online merchants identified at morerewards.ca may not qualify for this higher earn rate if the purchase is made with a third party merchant that is not a More Rewards partner. raw_text: how to redeem, please visit this site . When do Moi points get added to my Moi account? Your points are added to your Moi account monthly. For more information please visit this site . When will I receive my 5,000 bonus Moi points? You will be eligible to receive 3,000 welcome Moi points upon your first purchase (“Welcome Points”). The Welcome Points will appear on your monthly credit card statement and your Moi account up to six (6) weeks after your first purchase, provided your moi RBC Visa credit card account (“Credit Card Account”) remains open and in good standing at that time, “good standing” meaning that your Credit Card Account must not be past due for more than two (2) consecutive Credit Card Account statement periods, closed, charged off or in credit revoked status at that time. To receive 2,000 bonus Moi points (“Bonus Points”), (i) a total of $500 or more in qualifying net purchases and/or pre-authorized bill payment transactions (“Qualifying Transactions”) must be posted to your Credit Card Account within the first 3 months from your Credit Card Account opening date, and (ii) your Credit Card Account must remain open and in good standing at the time the Bonus Points are awarded to your Credit Card Account and your Moi account, approximately six (6) weeks after the date you reach $500 in Qualifying Transactions. Qualifying Transactions exclude cash advances (including balance transfers, cash-like transactions and bill payments that are not pre-authorized charges t

raw_text: Card Highlights Redeem Points Your Way Redeem WestJet points to cover all or part of your flight (including taxes, fees), vacation packages, and more 5 . The best part? WestJet points don’t expire. Earn on Everyday Spending Earn WestJet points on everyday purchases 2 and earn more on restaurants, food delivery, and digital subscriptions, streaming services, and digital games 3 . Enjoy Companion Vouchers & Flexible Exchanges Get a welcome round-trip companion voucher starting from $199 CAD (plus taxes, fees, charges and other ATC) after first purchase on your card. Your annual companion voucher will be issued each year thereafter when you spend a minimum of $2,500 annually 4 , or exchange it for a 25% flight discount 11 or 5,000 WestJet points 12 . View All Card Features Earn WestJet Points Faster 1.5 points Earn 1.5 points for every dollar you spend on WestJet flights, WestJet Vacations, and Sunwing Vacations 2 1.5 points Earn 1.5 points for every dollar you spend on restaurants, food delivery, digital subscriptions, streaming services and digital games 3 1 point Earn 1 point for every dollar you spend on everyday purchases 2 Use WestJet Points Your Way Fly for Less Use your WestJet points to pay for flights including taxes, fees, and surcharges. Start redeeming with as few as 2,500 points and even cover the full cost of your trip 5 . Enhance Every Journey Redeem your points for seat selection, checked bags, or cabin upgrades 5 . Enjoy added comfort and convenience every time

raw_text: Scotiabank Momentum Visa Infinite Card Account (the “Account”) is responsible for all charges to the Account including those made by the additional Supplementary Cardholder. Legal 4 Symbol (optional) 4 Legal Text 4% Cash Back Earn Rate: You will earn 4% Cash Back on eligible Purchases on your Account at Grocery and on Recurring Bill Payments, up to an annual spend limit of $25,000. 4% Cash Back applies at merchants which are classified in the Visa Inc. (Visa) network as Grocery Stores and Recurring Payments (Merchant Category Codes (“MCC”): 5411). Recurring Bill payments are defined as payments made on a monthly or regular basis automatically billed by the merchant to your Account. Recurring Bill Payments typically include telecommunication, insurance, membership, and subscription-based purchases. Not all merchants offer recurring bill payments on credit cards; please check with your merchant. 2% Cash Back Earn Rate: You will earn 2% Cash Back on eligible Purchases on Gas Stations, Electric Vehicle Charging (EV), Transit, Rideshare and Food Delivery, up to an annual spend limit of $25,000 (Merchant Category Codes (“MCC”): 5411, 5541, 5542, 5552, 4111, 4112, 4121, 4131, 4789; Food Delivery category includes transactions made via eligible food delivery services selected by Scotiabank, which are subject to change). 1% Cash Back Earn Rate: You will earn 1% Cash Back (the “Regular Earn Rate”) on eligible Purchases made on your Account after you have reached the annual spend limit

up to $850 ^ in welcome offers, first year rewards and savings value, and up to 45,000 bonus Scene+ points. Browse offer details About the offer To qualify for these offers make sure to open a new Scotiabank Gold American Express credit card account (“Account”) between January 2, 2026 and July 1, 2026. To qualify for the 45,000 bonus Scene+ points offer: Earn 25,000 bonus Scene+ points by making at least $2,000 in everyday eligible purchases in your first 3 months. You are eligible to earn an additional 20,000 Scene+ point bonus when you spend at least $7,500 in everyday eligible purchases in your first year. Once you qualify, we’ll credit your account in 2 instalments: 25,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after the qualifying $2,000 in eligible purchases being posted to your Account within the first 3 months of Account opening. An additional 20,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after you have met the $7,500 annual spend threshold in your Account in your first year. Note: For joint Accounts, the applicable bonus will be credited to the Scene+ account linked to the Account of the borrower that completed the last transaction to meet the qualifying amount of eligible purchases in the case of the 25,000 Point Bonus and the Additional 20,000 Point Bonus. Individuals who are currently or were previously primary or secondary cardholders of a Scotiabank personal credit card in the past 2 years, including those that switch from an existing Scotiabank personal credit card, as well as employees of Scotiabank, are not eligible for this offer. See terms and conditions below for full details. Apply now See if it’s right for you Your card at a glance 2 , 3 , 4 , 14 Annual fee $120 / year Waived with an eligible bank account Open an Ultimate Package chequing account and waive the ongoing annual fee for your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card. 3 Open a Preferred Package chequing account and waive the first year annual fee on a Scotiabank Gold American Express Card. 4 Minimum credit limit $5,000 Purchase interest rate 20.99% Cash advance rate 22.99% Your cash advance rate applies to advances, balance transfers, and cash-like transactions. Supplementary cards $29 / year You can apply if: You have a minimum personal income of $12,000 per year. Card highlights Earn up to 6X the Scene+ points 1 No foreign transaction fees 5 , Δ Skip to the Front of the Line with Amex 6 Earn up to 6X the Scene+ points 1 No foreign transaction fees 5 , Δ Skip to the Front of the Line with Amex 6 Earn up to 6X the Scene+ points 1 No foreign transaction fees 5 , Δ Skip to the Front of the Line with Amex 6 Built-in benefits Travel Everyday Amex Insurance Expand all Collapse all Get airport lounge access with Priority Pass As a Scotiabank Gold American Express cardholder, you get a discount on a Priority Pass membership. This gets you access to over 1,200 lounges around the world. 9 Earn Scene+ points on travel purchases Earn 1 Scene+ point for every $1 on eligible travel purchases. 1 Plus, earn an extra 3 Scene+ points for every $1 CAD you spend in Canada on hotels and car rentals when you book through Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia. 7 Apply Scene+ points to travel With Scene+, you have the flexibility to use your points on travel purchases, the way you want. To apply points to travel: 8 Use your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card to book your vacation with your favourite travel provider Wait for the purchase to be posted to your card Sign in to sceneplus.ca opens in a new tab and select Apply Points to Travel to redeem your points to cover the full or partial travel cost You can redeem points to cover your travel costs within 12 months from the date of your travel purchase Or, to book with Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia: 7 Sign into sceneplus.ca opens in a new tab Use Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia to plan your trip Fully or partially redeem your points on flights, car rentals, and hotels Expand all Collapse all No foreign transaction fees Shop online or abroad without the typical 2.5% foreign transaction fee on purchases made in a foreign currency. 5 Just the exchange rate applies. Buy now and pay over time with Scotia SelectPay A flexible way to pay off eligible Scotiabank credit card purchases of $100 or more, with low interest rates and no installment plan fee. § Expand all Collapse all Amex Experiences With Amex Experiences, you’ll get: Tickets and reservations to in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants, and special events, often before the general public, with Front Of The Line Presale Access to reserved seats for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardholders, even after shows are on sale to the general public, with Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets Entertainment and event offers just for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardholders All Amex Experiences are subject to availability and must be charged to your Amex card. 6 Exclusive Amex Offers† Get exclusive offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, just for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardmembers. 10 World-class concierge services Whether you need help booking restaurant reservations or scoring tickets for a show, the concierge service is happy to help you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. 11 Expand all Collapse all Travel Emergency Medical Receive up to $1 million in emergency medical coverage for you, your spouse, and your eligible dependent children. Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 25 consecutive days, and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 3 consecutive days. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Trip Cancellation and Trip Interruption Insurance Protect your trip with trip cancellation and interruption insurance when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your card. 12 You, your spouse, and your dependent children are eligible for up to $1,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum of $10,000 per trip). 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Flight Delay Insurance When you charge at least 75% of your ticket to your card, you’re eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses if your flight is delayed up to $500 per insured person on the same trip. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Delayed and Lost Luggage Insurance If your checked luggage is delayed or lost, you may be covered up to $1,000 if you charged the full cost of your travel ticket to your card. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Common Carrier Travel Accident When you charge at least 75% of your trip to your card, you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment up to $500,000 per insured person and up to $1,000,000 per occurrence. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Insurance If your eligible rental car is damaged or stolen, you’re automatically insured if you: Charged the full cost of the rental to your card Rented the vehicle in your name Declined the rental agency’s collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance Get up to $1,000 in theft coverage when you use your card to pay for a hotel or motel stay in Canada or the US. The coverage applies to you, your spouse, and your dependent children. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Mobile Device Insurance If you charge the full purchase price of your new smartphone or tablet to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card and activate available cellular technology with a provider or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your card when you fund the purchase through a plan, you may be covered for up to $1,000 CAD if the device is lost, stolen, or accidentally damaged. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection Most new purchases made with your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card are protected against theft, loss, or damage for 90 days from the purchase date. 12 Plus, when you charge the full cost of most items to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card, extended warranty coverage may double the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to one year. 12 Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. 12 Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty for repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Optional Scotia Credit Card Protection (SCCP) This optional insurance helps protect your finances by helping cover your balance or monthly payments during unexpected life events, such as 13 : Death Critical Illness Hospitalization Disability Job Loss Strike or Lockout There are two different coverage bundles to choose from 13 : Basic Protection Life Benefit Critical Illness Benefit Hospitalization Benefit Comprehensive Protection Life Benefit Critical Illness Benefit Hospitalization Benefit Disability Benefit Job Loss Benefit Strike or Lockout Benefit Learn about SCCP opens in a new tab Scene+ points on everyday purchases Earn Redeem Earn Scene+ points for every $1 you spend on eligible purchases. 1 6 points At Sobeys, Safeway, FreshCo, Foodland and more . 5 points On dining, food delivery, food subscriptions, and other eligible grocery stores. 5 points On eligible entertainment purchases. Includes movies, theatre, and ticket agencies. Up to 4 points Earn 1 Scene+ point for every $1 you spend on eligible travel purchases. Plus, earn an extra 3 Scene+ points for every $1 you spend on hotels and car rentals when you book through Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia. 7 3 points On eligible gas and transit options. Includes rideshare, buses, taxis, subways, and more. 3 points On eligible streaming services. 1 point On all other eligible purchases. Earn extra points with Scene+ rewards partners when you show your Scene+ membership card. Calculate your rewards Redeem your points, your way. Visit the Scene+ hub to explore all the ways to redeem or check out a few examples here: 1,000 points $10 off Cineplex movie tickets. 3,000 points $20 account credit on eligible accounts. 5,000 points $50 off at Home Hardware. 10,000 points $100 off at eligible grocery stores. 20,000 points $200 off travel with Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia and Apply Points to Travel. Some redemptions require a minimum number of points. Learn more opens in a new tab . Browse all awards . Frequently asked questions Expand all Collapse all Which credit cards give me access to airport lounges? The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite, Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege, and Scotiabank American Express Platinum cards give you access to airport lounges. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite card gives primary cardholders a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus six complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege card gives the primary and each additional cardholder a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus ten complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. This program is powered by DragonPass, and provides access to 1,200+ airport lounges globally, including participating Plaza Premium Lounges. These lounge visits are eligible for the primary cardholder and a travel companion. Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardholders can visit lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Primary cardholders get a complimentary membership to Priority Pass, plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrollment. Supplementary cardholders get a Priority Pass membership and 4 free visits per year. How do I activate my card? To activate a Scotiabank Visa or American Express credit card, visit our online activation page . To activate a Mastercard, please call 1-866-583-6289 . How do I add a supplementary card? when you fund the purchase through a plan, you may be covered for up to $1,000 CAD if the device is lost, stolen, or accidentally damaged. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Purchase The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege card gives the primary and each additional cardholder a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus ten complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. Browse offer details About the offer To qualify for these offers make sure to open a new Scotiabank Gold American Express credit card account (“Account”) between January 2, 2026 and July 1, 2026. To qualify for the 45,000 bonus Scene+ points offer: Earn 25,000 bonus Scene+ points by making at least $2,000 in everyday eligible purchases in your first 3 months. You are eligible to earn an additional 20,000 Scene+ point bonus when you spend at least $7,500 in everyday eligible purchases in your first year. Once you qualify, we’ll credit your account in 2 instalments: 25,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after the qualifying $2,000 in eligible purchases being posted to your Account within the first 3 months of Account opening. An additional 20,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after you have met the $7,500 annual spend threshold in your Account in your first year. Note: For joint Accounts, the applicable bonus will be credited to the Scene+ account linked to the Account of the borrower that completed the last transaction to meet the qualifying amount of eligible purchases in the case of the 25,000 Point Bonus and the Additional 20,000 Point Bonus. Individuals who are currently or were previously primary or secondary cardholders of a Scotiabank personal credit card in the past 2 years, including those that switch from an existing Scotiabank personal credit card, as well as employees of Scotiabank, are not eligible for this offer. See terms and conditions below for full details. smartphone or tablet to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card and activate available cellular technology with a provider or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your card when you fund the purchase through a plan, you may be covered for up to $1,000 CAD if the device is lost, stolen, or accidentally damaged. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Purchase repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Optional Scotia Credit Card Protection (SCCP) This optional The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege card gives the primary and each additional cardholder a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus ten complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. Browse offer details About the offer To qualify for these offers make sure to open a new Scotiabank Gold American Express credit card account (“Account”) between January 2, 2026 and July 1, 2026. To qualify for the 45,000 bonus Scene+ points offer: Earn 25,000 bonus Scene+ points by making at least $2,000 in everyday eligible purchases in your first 3 months. You are eligible to earn an additional 20,000 Scene+ point bonus when you spend at least $7,500 in everyday eligible purchases in your first year. Once you qualify, we’ll credit your account in 2 instalments: 25,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after the qualifying $2,000 in eligible purchases being posted to your Account within the first 3 months of Account opening. An additional 20,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after you have met the $7,500 annual spend threshold in your Account in your first year. Note: For joint Accounts, the applicable bonus will be credited to the Scene+ account linked to the Account of the borrower that completed the last transaction to meet the qualifying amount of eligible purchases in the case of the 25,000 Point Bonus and the Additional 20,000 Point Bonus. Individuals who are currently or were previously primary or secondary cardholders of a Scotiabank personal credit card in the past 2 years, including those that switch from an existing Scotiabank personal credit card, as well as employees of Scotiabank, are not eligible for this offer. up to $850 ^ in welcome offers, first year rewards and savings value, and up to 45,000 bonus Scene+ points. Browse offer details About the offer To qualify for these offers make sure to open a new Scotiabank Gold American Express credit card account (“Account”) between January 2, 2026 and July 1, 2026. To qualify for the 45,000 bonus Scene+ points offer: Earn 25,000 bonus Scene+ points by making at least $2,000 in everyday eligible purchases in your first 3 months. You are eligible to earn an additional 20,000 Scene+ point bonus when you spend at least $7,500 in everyday eligible purchases in your first year. Once you qualify, we’ll credit your account in 2 instalments: 25,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after the qualifying $2,000 in eligible purchases being posted to your Account within the first 3 months of Account opening. An additional 20,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after you have met the $7,500 annual spend threshold in your Account in your first year. Note: For joint Accounts, the applicable bonus will be credited to the Scene+ account linked to the Account of the borrower that completed the last transaction to meet the qualifying amount of eligible purchases in the case of the 25,000 Point Bonus and the Additional 20,000 Point Bonus. Individuals who are currently or were previously primary or secondary cardholders of a Scotiabank personal credit card in the past 2 years, including those that switch from an existing Scotiabank personal credit card, as well as employees of Scotiabank, are not eligible for this offer. See terms and conditions below for full details. Supplementary cards $29 / year You can apply if: You have a minimum personal income of $12,000 per year. Browse all awards . Frequently asked questions Expand all Collapse all Which credit cards give me access to airport lounges? The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite, Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege, and Scotiabank American Express Platinum cards give you access to airport lounges. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite card gives primary cardholders a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus six complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege card gives the primary and each additional cardholder a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus ten complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. This program is powered by DragonPass, and provides access to 1,200+ airport lounges globally, including participating Plaza Premium Lounges. These lounge visits are eligible for the primary cardholder and a travel companion. Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardholders can visit lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Primary cardholders get a complimentary membership to Priority Pass, plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrollment. Supplementary cardholders get a Priority Pass membership and 4 free visits per year. How do I activate my card? To activate a Scotiabank Visa or American Express credit card, visit our online activation page . To activate a Mastercard, please call 1-866-583-6289 . How do I add a supplementary card? To add a supplementary card to your credit card account: From your Accounts page, select your credit card account Select Additional Services Select Add Supplementary Cards and follow the instructions Browse more FAQs Ready to apply? We’ll ask a few quick questions including ones about your job, your yearly income, and where you live. Open an account This will take about 15 minutes. up to $850 ^ in welcome offers, first year rewards and savings value, and up to 45,000 bonus Scene+ points. Browse offer details About the offer To qualify for these offers make sure to open a new Scotiabank Gold American Express credit card account (“Account”) between January 2, 2026 and July 1, 2026. To qualify for the 45,000 bonus Scene+ points offer: Earn 25,000 bonus Scene+ points by making at least $2,000 in everyday eligible purchases in your first 3 months. You are eligible to earn an additional 20,000 Scene+ point bonus when you spend at least $7,500 in everyday eligible purchases in your first year. Once you qualify, we’ll credit your account in 2 instalments: 25,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after the qualifying $2,000 in eligible purchases being posted to your Account within the first 3 months of Account opening. An additional 20,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after you have met the $7,500 annual spend threshold in your Account in your first year. Note: For joint Accounts, the applicable bonus will be credited to the Scene+ account linked to the Account of the borrower that completed the last transaction to meet the qualifying amount of eligible purchases in the case of the 25,000 Point Bonus and the Additional 20,000 Point Bonus. Individuals who are currently or were previously primary or secondary cardholders of a Scotiabank personal credit card in the past 2 years, including those that switch from an existing Scotiabank personal credit card, as well as employees of Scotiabank, are not eligible for this offer. See terms and conditions below for full details. Apply now See if it’s right for you Your card at a glance 2 , 3 , 4 , 14 Annual fee $120 / year Waived with an eligible bank account Open an Ultimate Package chequing account and waive the ongoing annual fee for your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card. 3 Open a Preferred Package chequing account and waive the first year annual fee on a Scotiabank Gold American Express Card. 4 Minimum credit limit $5,000 Purchase interest rate 20.99% Cash advance rate 22.99% Your cash advance rate applies to advances, balance transfers, and cash-like transactions. Supplementary cards $29 / year You can apply if: You have a minimum personal income of $12,000 per year. Card highlights Earn up to 6X the Scene+ points 1 No foreign transaction fees 5 , Δ Skip to the Front of the Line with Amex 6 Earn up to 6X the Scene+ points 1 No foreign transaction fees 5 , Δ Skip to the Front of the Line with Amex 6 Earn up to 6X the Scene+ points 1 No foreign transaction fees 5 , Δ Skip to the Front of the Line with Amex 6 Built-in benefits Travel Everyday Amex Insurance Expand all Collapse all Get airport lounge access with Priority Pass As a Scotiabank Gold American Express cardholder, you get a discount on a Priority Pass membership. This gets you access to over 1,200 lounges around the world. 9 Earn Scene+ points on travel purchases Earn 1 Scene+ point for every $1 on eligible travel purchases. 1 Plus, earn an extra 3 Scene+ points for every $1 CAD you spend in Canada on hotels and car rentals when you book through Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia. 7 Apply Scene+ points to travel With Scene+, you have the flexibility to use your points on travel purchases, the way you want. To apply points to travel: 8 Use your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card to book your vacation with your favourite travel provider Wait for the purchase to be posted to your card Sign in to sceneplus.ca opens in a new tab and select Apply Points to Travel to redeem your points to cover the full or partial travel cost You can redeem points to cover your travel costs within 12 months from the date of your travel purchase Or, to book with Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia: 7 Sign into sceneplus.ca opens in a new tab Use Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia to plan your trip Fully or partially redeem your points on flights, car rentals, and hotels Expand all Collapse all No foreign transaction fees Shop online or abroad without the typical 2.5% foreign transaction fee on purchases made in a foreign currency. 5 Just the exchange rate applies. Buy now and pay over time with Scotia SelectPay A flexible way to pay off eligible Scotiabank credit card purchases of $100 or more, with low interest rates and no installment plan fee. § Expand all Collapse all Amex Experiences With Amex Experiences, you’ll get: Tickets and reservations to in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants, and special events, often before the general public, with Front Of The Line Presale Access to reserved seats for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardholders, even after shows are on sale to the general public, with Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets Entertainment and event offers just for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardholders All Amex Experiences are subject to availability and must be charged to your Amex card. 6 Exclusive Amex Offers† Get exclusive offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, just for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardmembers. 10 World-class concierge services Whether you need help booking restaurant reservations or scoring tickets for a show, the concierge service is happy to help you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. 11 Expand all Collapse all Travel Emergency Medical Receive up to $1 million in emergency medical coverage for you, your spouse, and your eligible dependent children. Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 25 consecutive days, and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 3 consecutive days. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Trip Cancellation and Trip Interruption Insurance Protect your trip with trip cancellation and interruption insurance when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your card. 12 You, your spouse, and your dependent children are eligible for up to $1,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum of $10,000 per trip). 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Flight Delay Insurance When you charge at least 75% of your ticket to your card, you’re eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses if your flight is delayed up to $500 per insured person on the same trip. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Delayed and Lost Luggage Insurance If your checked luggage is delayed or lost, you may be covered up to $1,000 if you charged the full cost of your travel ticket to your card. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Common Carrier Travel Accident When you charge at least 75% of your trip to your card, you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment up to $500,000 per insured person and up to $1,000,000 per occurrence. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Insurance If your eligible rental car is damaged or stolen, you’re automatically insured if you: Charged the full cost of the rental to your card Rented the vehicle in your name Declined the rental agency’s collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance Get up to $1,000 in theft coverage when you use your card to pay for a hotel or motel stay in Canada or the US. The coverage applies to you, your spouse, and your dependent children. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Mobile Device Insurance If you charge the full purchase price of your new smartphone or tablet to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card and activate available cellular technology with a provider or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your card when you fund the purchase through a plan, you may be covered for up to $1,000 CAD if the device is lost, stolen, or accidentally damaged. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection Most new purchases made with your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card are protected against theft, loss, or damage for 90 days from the purchase date. 12 Plus, when you charge the full cost of most items to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card, extended warranty coverage may double the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to one year. 12 Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. 12 Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty for repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Optional Scotia Credit Card Protection (SCCP) This optional insurance helps protect your finances by helping cover your balance or monthly payments during unexpected life events, such as 13 : Death Critical Illness Hospitalization Disability Job Loss Strike or Lockout There are two different coverage bundles to choose from 13 : Basic Protection Life Benefit Critical Illness Benefit Hospitalization Benefit Comprehensive Protection Life Benefit Critical Illness Benefit Hospitalization Benefit Disability Benefit Job Loss Benefit Strike or Lockout Benefit Learn about SCCP opens in a new tab Scene+ points on everyday purchases Earn Redeem Earn Scene+ points for every $1 you spend on eligible purchases. 1 6 points At Sobeys, Safeway, FreshCo, Foodland and more . 5 points On dining, food delivery, food subscriptions, and other eligible grocery stores. 5 points On eligible entertainment purchases. Includes movies, theatre, and ticket agencies. Up to 4 points Earn 1 Scene+ point for every $1 you spend on eligible travel purchases. Plus, earn an extra 3 Scene+ points for every $1 you spend on hotels and car rentals when you book through Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia. 7 3 points On eligible gas and transit options. Includes rideshare, buses, taxis, subways, and more. 3 points On eligible streaming services. 1 point On all other eligible purchases. Earn extra points with Scene+ rewards partners when you show your Scene+ membership card. Calculate your rewards Redeem your points, your way. Visit the Scene+ hub to explore all the ways to redeem or check out a few examples here: 1,000 points $10 off Cineplex movie tickets. 3,000 points $20 account credit on eligible accounts. 5,000 points $50 off at Home Hardware. 10,000 points $100 off at eligible grocery stores. 20,000 points $200 off travel with Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia and Apply Points to Travel. Some redemptions require a minimum number of points. Learn more opens in a new tab . Calculate your rewards Upcoming changes to Scotiabank Credit Cards, visit here for more details × Your award-winning credit card Winner of the 2025 Rewards Canada Top Travel Points Credit Card (annual fees) ± 2025 milesopedia Best Credit Card For Groceries ± 2025 Ratesdotca Best Credit Card for Subscriptions Δ± Winner of the 2025 creditcardGenius Best Foreign Exchange Credit Card ± Winner of the 2024 Rewards Canada Top Travel Points Credit Card (annual fees) † Winner of the 2023 MoneySense Best Rewards Card for everyday spending Winner of the 2023 credit card Genius Best Foreign Exchange Credit Card ± Winner of the 2022 Rewards Canada Top Travel Points Credit Card (annual fees) ‡ Winner of the 2022 credit card Genius Best Foreign Exchange Credit Card ± Winner of the 2022 MoneySense Best Rewards Card for everyday spending Winner of the 2021 Rewards Canada Top Travel Points Credit Card (annual fees) Winner of the 2021 creditcardGenius Best Flexible Credit Card Winner of the 2021 MoneySense Best Rewards Cards (everyday use) Winner of the 2020 MoneySense Best Travel Card for everyday use Your award-winning credit card Leading publishers like Rewards Canada and milesopedia agree that the Scotiabank Gold American Express Card is a winner. Browse all awards . Frequently asked questions Expand all Collapse all Which credit cards give me access to airport lounges? The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite, Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege, and Scotiabank American Express Platinum cards give you access to airport lounges. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite card gives primary cardholders a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus six complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege card gives the primary and each additional cardholder a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus ten complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. This program is powered by DragonPass, and provides access to 1,200+ airport lounges globally, including participating Plaza Premium Lounges. These lounge visits are eligible for the primary cardholder and a travel companion. Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardholders can visit lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Primary cardholders get a complimentary membership to Priority Pass, plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrollment. Supplementary cardholders get a Priority Pass membership and 4 free visits per year. How do I activate my card? To activate a Scotiabank Visa or American Express credit card, visit our online activation page . To activate a Mastercard, please call 1-866-583-6289 . How do I add a supplementary card? To add a supplementary card to your credit card account: From your Accounts page, select your credit card account Select Additional Services Select Add Supplementary Cards and follow the instructions Browse more FAQs Ready to apply? We’ll ask a few quick questions including ones about your job, your yearly income, and where you live. Open an account This will take about 15 minutes. Apply now Speak to an advisor We’re here to help. Book an appointment Not sure if this is right for you? Browse offer details About the offer To qualify for these offers make sure to open a new Scotiabank Gold American Express credit card account (“Account”) between January 2, 2026 and July 1, 2026. To qualify for the 45,000 bonus Scene+ points offer: Earn 25,000 bonus Scene+ points by making at least $2,000 in everyday eligible purchases in your first 3 months. You are eligible to earn an additional 20,000 Scene+ point bonus when you spend at least $7,500 in everyday eligible purchases in your first year. Once you qualify, we’ll credit your account in 2 instalments: 25,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after the qualifying $2,000 in eligible purchases being posted to your Account within the first 3 months of Account opening. An additional 20,000 bonus Scene+ points will be credited to the applicable Scene+ membership account approximately 8 weeks after you have met the $7,500 annual spend threshold in your Account in your first year. Note: For joint Accounts, the applicable bonus will be credited to the Scene+ account linked to the Account of the borrower that completed the last transaction to meet the qualifying amount of eligible purchases in the case of the 25,000 Point Bonus and the Additional 20,000 Point Bonus. Individuals who are currently or were previously primary or secondary cardholders of a Scotiabank personal credit card in the past 2 years, including those that switch from an existing Scotiabank personal credit card, as well as employees of Scotiabank, are not eligible for this offer. See terms and conditions below for full details. This gets you access to over 1,200 lounges around the world. 9 Earn Scene+ points on travel purchases Earn 1 Scene+ point for every $1 on eligible travel purchases. 1 Plus, earn an extra 3 Scene+ points for every $1 CAD you spend in Canada on hotels and car rentals when you book through Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia. 7 Apply Scene+ points to travel With Scene+, you have the flexibility to use your points on travel purchases, the way you want. To apply points to travel: 8 Use your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card to book your vacation with your favourite travel provider Wait for the purchase to be posted to your card Sign in to sceneplus.ca opens in a new tab and select Apply Points to Travel to redeem your points to cover the full or partial travel cost You can redeem points to cover your travel costs within 12 months from the date of your travel purchase Or, to book with Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia: 7 Sign into sceneplus.ca opens in a new tab Use Scene+ Travel, Powered by Expedia to plan your trip Fully or partially redeem your points on flights, car rentals, and hotels Expand all Collapse all No foreign transaction fees Shop online or abroad without the typical 2.5% foreign transaction fee on purchases made in a foreign currency. 5 Just the exchange rate applies. Buy now and pay over time with Scotia SelectPay A flexible way to pay off eligible Scotiabank credit card purchases of $100 or more, with low interest rates and no installment plan fee. § Expand all Collapse all Amex Experiences With Amex Experiences, you’ll get: Tickets and reservations to in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants, and special events, often before the general public, with Front Of The Line Presale Access to reserved seats for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardholders, even after shows are on sale to the general public, with Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets Entertainment and event offers just for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardholders All Amex Experiences are subject to availability and must be charged to your Amex card. 6 Exclusive Amex Offers† Get exclusive offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, just for Scotiabank Gold American Express Card cardmembers. 10 World-class concierge services Whether you need help booking restaurant reservations or scoring tickets for a show, the concierge service is happy to help you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. 11 Expand all Collapse all Travel Emergency Medical Receive up to $1 million in emergency medical coverage for you, your spouse, and your eligible dependent children. Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 25 consecutive days, and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 3 consecutive days. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Trip Cancellation and Trip Interruption Insurance Protect your trip with trip cancellation and interruption insurance when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your card. 12 You, your spouse, and your dependent children are eligible for up to $1,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum of $10,000 per trip). 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Flight Delay Insurance When you charge at least 75% of your ticket to your card, you’re eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses if your flight is delayed up to $500 per insured person on the same trip. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Delayed and Lost Luggage Insurance If your checked luggage is delayed or lost, you may be covered up to $1,000 if you charged the full cost of your travel ticket to your card. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Common Carrier Travel Accident When you charge at least 75% of your trip to your card, you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment up to $500,000 per insured person and up to $1,000,000 per occurrence. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Insurance If your eligible rental car is damaged or stolen, you’re automatically insured if you: Charged the full cost of the rental to your card Rented the vehicle in your name Declined the rental agency’s collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance Get up to $1,000 in theft coverage when you use your card to pay for a hotel or motel stay in Canada or the US. The coverage applies to you, your spouse, and your dependent children. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Mobile Device Insurance If you charge the full purchase price of your new smartphone or tablet to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card and activate available cellular technology with a provider or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your card when you fund the purchase through a plan, you may be covered for up to $1,000 CAD if the device is lost, stolen, or accidentally damaged. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection Most new purchases made with your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card are protected against theft, loss, or damage for 90 days from the purchase date. 12 Plus, when you charge the full cost of most items to your Scotiabank Gold American Express Card, extended warranty coverage may double the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to one year. 12 Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. 12 Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty for repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase. 12 Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Optional Scotia Credit Card Protection (SCCP) This optional insurance helps protect your finances by helping cover your balance or monthly payments during unexpected life events, such as 13 : Death Critical Illness Hospitalization Disability Job Loss Strike or Browse all awards . Frequently asked questions Expand all Collapse all Which credit cards give me access to airport lounges? The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite, Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege, and Scotiabank American Express Platinum cards give you access to airport lounges. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite card gives primary cardholders a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus six complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. The Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite Privilege card gives the primary and each additional cardholder a complimentary membership in the Visa Airport Companion Program, plus ten complimentary lounge visits per year from the date of enrollment. This program is powered by DragonPass, and provides access to 1,200+ airport lounges globally, including participating Plaza Premium Lounges. These lounge visits are eligible for the primary cardholder and a travel companion. Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardholders can visit lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Primary cardholders get a complimentary membership to Priority Pass, plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrollment. Supplementary cardholders get a Priority Pass membership and 4 free visits per year. How do I activate my card? To activate a Scotiabank Visa or American Express credit card, visit our online activation page . To activate a Mastercard, please call 1-866-583-6289 . How do I add a supplementary card? Use the AVIS worldwide discount code C030401. To book with Budget, visit https://www.budget.com/scotiabankmomentum opens in a new tab or call 1-800-268-8900 . Use the Budget Corporate Discount code A363301. Buy now and pay over time with Scotia SelectPay A flexible way to pay off eligible Scotiabank credit card purchases of $100 or more, with low interest rates and no installment plan fee. 6 Learn about Scotia SelectPay. Expand all Collapse all Purchase Security & Extended Warranty Protection Most new purchases made with your card are protected against theft, loss, or damage for 90 days from the purchase date. 7 Plus, when you charge the full cost of most items to your card, extended warranty coverage can double the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to one year. 7 Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase. Certificate of Insurance opens in a new tab Scotia Credit Card Protection (optional) This insurance coverage can provide you and your family financial protection by paying off your outstanding account balance or helping to cover your monthly credit card payments as a result of certain unexpected life events, such as Death, Critical Illness, Hospitalization, Disability, Job Loss or Strike or Lockout. 8 There are two different coverage bundles to choose from: Basic Protection which includes: Life benefit Critical illness benefit Hospitalization benefit Comprehensive Protection which includes: Life benefit Critical illness b

Card Name: Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card
Issuer: Scotiabank
Country: Canada
Network: American Express
Card Type: Credit Card
Annual Fee: 399.0
Monthly Fee: Not available
Rewards Type: scene+
Best Categories: grocery,dining,travel,student,cashback
Welcome Bonus: Earn up to $2,500 in value in the first 14 months, including up to 80,000 4 bonus Scene+ points . Offer details Fees, rates & other information 5 Annual fee $399 Minimum credit limit $10,000 Purchase interest rate 9.99% Cash advance rate 9.99% Including balance transfers, Scotia Credit Card Cheques and cash-like transactions Supplementary cards $99/year 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. Your card comes with great benefits Benefits Insurance coverage Benefits Insurance coverage 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum Cardholder you receive access to lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Access includes: Use of lounges in the program regardless of the class of travel or airline you're flying Privileged access to over 1200 Airport VIP Lounges worldwide Relaxing ambience – for both you and your guests Complimentary refreshments and snacks Email, internet and conference space Primary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Supplementary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 4 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Lounge visits exceeding your complimentary benefit entitlement will be charged at the prevailing retail rate which can be found at https://www.prioritypass.com/join-prioritypass To take advantage of this benefit, each Cardholder (primary and supplementary) needs to enrol for the Priority Pass membership separately. In order to apply for a Priority Pass go to prioritypass.com/scotiabankplatinum and provide code Scotia1 for primary cardholder and code Scotia2 for supplementary cardholder. No foreign transaction fees 7 You will not be charged a Foreign Currency Conversion mark-up on foreign currency purchases whether you make them online or outside of Canada. Only the exchange rate applies. Get ready to take off with Scene+ Travel 2 With Scene+ Travel, you can earn 3 Scene+ points per Canadian dollar (CAD$) spent on hotel and car rental bookings made through Scene+ Travel using your Scotiabank American Express Card. Points can be redeemed on the total value of Things to do, hotel or car rental booking purchases (including taxes and fees) made through Scene+ Travel. You can access a range of flexible options when it comes to booking and redeeming for travel purchases.2 You can choose to book online or over the phone. To book online: Log in to your Scene+ account at sceneplus.ca Plan your trip Book your travel with points, your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card, or a combination of both Apply Scene+ Points to Travel 8 With Scene+, you have the flexibility to make your own travel arrangements at any travel provider, site or operator that you choose, and then select the “Apply Points to Travel” option to redeem points to cover off your trip costs within 12 months of the date of the travel purchase. Book eligible travel using your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card or other Scotia credit card that earns Scene+ points. Wait for your travel purchase to be posted to your Card. Log into sceneplus.ca , and redeem your Scene+ points towards the travel purchase8. To learn more on how to apply Scene+ points to Travel, call 1-866-586-2805 or visit sceneplus.ca . Beyond travel rewards Treat yourself or your loved ones with rewarding experiences and exclusive offers by Scene+ (Shopping and gift cards, Dining, Entertainment, Points for credit). Redeeming is easy. Shopping and gift cards - Redeem for the latest in tech through the Apple and Best Buy catalogues, and for gift cards at more than 60 national retailers. Dining - Redeem points at over 800+ restaurant partners including Swiss Chalet, Harvey’s, Montana’s and more. Entertainment - Redeem points at Cineplex Theatres^, Cineplex Store^, The Rec Room^ and Playdium^. Points for credit - Use the ‘Points for Credit’ option to receive a statement credit on your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card. Remember to review the Scene+ Program Terms and Conditions available on scene.ca/sceneplus for full details about these program benefits. For more information about all the ways you can redeem your points or about the Scene+ Program, visit scene.ca/sceneplus or call 1-866-586-2805. Enjoy premium concierge services 3 For everything from restaurant reservations to show tickets to finding the perfect birthday gift, your full-service travel and lifestyle Concierge Service is happy to assist, 24/7. Amex Experiences Amex Experiences 9 includes: Front Of The Line Presale Tickets or reservations to some of the most in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants and special events, often before the general public. Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets gets you access to a block of great seats reserved for Cardmembers even after shows are on sale to the public. Special Offers & Experiences for all Cardmembers - enjoy a variety of special Entertainment offers and events created for Cardmembers. Sign up for e-Updates Premium Lifestyle Experiences 15 Your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card gives you access to an array of incredible experiences. For the evolved palate Access to culinary experiences featuring the world’s greatest chefs including private group dinners, cooking classes, and culinary apprenticeships. Travel in style and luxury Enjoy a variety of special offers and discounts along your travel journey. With access to discounted bookings, car rental perks, and curated hotel offerings, travel has never been easier. The best of entertainment Enjoy a variety of special offers and events created for Cardmembers. From advance screenings of blockbuster movies, music and theatre packages, it’s easy to have an experience you’ll never forget. Make everyday more premium Access lifestyle benefits to get the most out of life. Platinum benefits can improve life’s everyday moments, from elevating your golf game to exploring the latest fashion trends with top designers. Amex Offers † Make every day more rewarding with Amex Offers † With offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, there’s something for everyone. Adding offers to your card is quick, easy, and best of all, incredibly rewarding. 14 Register your Card Be a Hertz #1 Club Gold Member Enjoy speedier service, less paperwork, and other special privileges and benefits at over 8,500 locations across 147 countries. Save time at the checkout Tap your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card or your smartphone for quick easy payments. Pay faster Apple Pay – The easy, secure, and private way to pay with your eligible Scotiabank credit cards 11 . Insurance coverage available with your Card Take advantage of all the ways a Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card adds to your life. Travel Emergency Medical Insurance 12 Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 31 consecutive days and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 10 consecutive days. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardmember (cardmember includes the primary cardmember and any supplemental cardmember), you, your spouse and your dependent children are each eligible for up to $2 million in emergency medical coverage if sudden and unexpected illness or accidental injury should occur while travelling outside your province or territory of residence in Canada. Coverage includes eligible expenses for hospital care, nursing care, prescription drugs, licensed ambulances and physicians' and surgeons' fees, as well as other eligible medical services and supplies. The date of departure is counted as the first day. This benefit is subject to an exclusion for pre-existing medical conditions. If you are under age 65 and are travelling for more than 31 days or if you are age 65 and older and travelling for more than 10 days, you may choose to purchase additional days from the insurer prior to your departure date by calling 1-877-222-7342. You will receive a separate Certificate of Insurance if you choose to purchase this coverage. Certificate of Insurance Trip Cancellation / Trip Interruption Insurance 12 Protect your travel investment with trip cancellation and trip interruption insurance at no extra cost when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your Card. You, your spouse and your dependent children are eligible for up to $2,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum $10,000 per trip) for trip cancellation benefits and for up to $5,000 per person for travel expenses (maximum $25,000 per trip) for trip interruption when you charge at least 75% of such trip expenses to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and are forced to cancel or interrupt your trip for medical or non-medical causes. Coverage provides reimbursement of non-refundable eligible trip costs and additional charges for ticketing changes. Certificate of Insurance Flight Delay Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of the full ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and you’ll be eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses such as hotel accommodations, meals and other emergency items. You may be reimbursed for eligible necessary and reasonable living expenses incurred during the period of a delayed flight or missed connection which lasts four hours or more to a limit of $1,000 per insured person on the same trip. Certificate of Insurance Rental Car Collision Loss/Damage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your eligible rental car to your Card and you’re automatically insured if your rental is damaged or stolen. You are automatically covered by Collision Loss/Damage Insurance when you rent a vehicle in your name, decline the agency's collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver (or similar provision) and use your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card to pay for the entire cost of the rental. If your rental car is damaged or stolen you are covered for the amount that you are liable to the Rental Agency up to the actual cash value of the vehicle. Note that the rental period cannot exceed 48 consecutive days and vehicles costing over $65,000 are not covered. Certificate of Insurance Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your airplane, train, bus or cruise ship tickets to your Card. If your checked luggage is delayed or lost – you’re covered. When you purchase common carrier tickets with your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you are eligible for coverage against the loss or the delay of your checked luggage. The lost luggage benefit is limited to the lesser of the value of the covered luggage or the actual replacement cost of the lost or stolen covered luggage, to a combined maximum of $1,000. The delayed luggage benefit is limited to $1,000 for all insured persons on the same trip for the cost of replacing eligible essential items if your checked luggage is not delivered within four (4) hours from your time of arrival at your final destination. Certificate of Insurance Travel Accident Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of your ticket cost to your Card and you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment. You, your spouse and eligible dependent children will be automatically insured against accidental loss of life, or dismemberment – up to a maximum of $500,000 (to a maximum of $1,000,000 per occurrence). Coverage is in place while occupying a common carrier for which you have charged at least 75% of the ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, and which is licensed to carry passengers such as airplanes, cruise ships, trains or buses. Certificate of Insurance Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance 12 Use your Card to pay for your stay at any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S. When you check into any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S., and charge your stay to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you and your spouse and dependent children travelling with you will be eligible for coverage against theft of your covered personal property if your room is broken into. Should your claim exceed the amount reimbursable by the hotel, and/or any applicable insurance protection, your coverage picks up the balance, up to a maximum of $1,000. Certificate of Insurance Mobile Device Insurance 12 You may have Mobile Device Insurance for new cell phones, smartphones, or tablets purchased on or after July 1, 2022, when you charge the full cost of your new mobile device to your Card, or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your Card when you fund such purchase through a plan. You may be covered for up to $1,000 in the event your cell phone, smartphone, or tablet is lost, stolen, accidentally damaged, or experiences mechanical failure. Certificate of Insurance For claim forms and answers to Frequently Asked Questions visit our partner's site . Shop with added coverage Added coverage means you can shop with confidence anywhere around the world. Purchase Security & Extended Warranty Protection 12 Most items purchased with your Card are insured against theft, loss or damage for 120 days from the purchase date and the manufacturer’s warranty is doubled for up to one year. Most items purchased anywhere in the world are automatically insured against theft, loss or damage as long as the full cost of the item is charged to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card. Coverage extends for the first 120 days from the date of purchase, is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. When you charge the full cost of most items to your Card, extended warranty coverage doubles the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to two years. Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price. Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase.

raw_text: benefits Benefits Insurance coverage Benefits Insurance coverage 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum Cardholder you receive access to lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Access includes: Use of lounges in the program regardless of the class of travel or airline you're flying Privileged access to over 1200 Airport VIP Lounges worldwide Relaxing ambience – for both you and your guests Complimentary refreshments and snacks Email, internet and conference space Primary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Supplementary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 4 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Lounge visits exceeding your complimentary benefit entitlement will be charged at the prevailing retail rate which can be found at https://www.prioritypass.com/join-prioritypass To take advantage of this benefit, each Cardholder (primary and supplementary) needs to enrol for the Priority Pass membership separately. In order to apply for a Priority Pass go to prioritypass.com/scotiabankplatinum and provide code Scotia1 for primary cardholder and code Scotia2 for supplementary cardholder. No foreign transaction fees 7 You will not be charged a Foreign Currency Conversion mark-up on foreign currency purchases whether you make them online or outside of Canada. Only the exchange rate applies. Get ready to take off with Scene+ Travel 2 With Scene+ Travel, you can earn 3
