Card Name: Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card
Issuer: Scotiabank
Country: Canada
Network: American Express
Card Type: Credit Card
Annual Fee: 399.0
Monthly Fee: Not available
Rewards Type: scene+
Best Categories: grocery,dining,travel,student,cashback
Welcome Bonus: Earn up to $2,500 in value in the first 14 months, including up to 80,000 4 bonus Scene+ points . Offer details Fees, rates & other information 5 Annual fee $399 Minimum credit limit $10,000 Purchase interest rate 9.99% Cash advance rate 9.99% Including balance transfers, Scotia Credit Card Cheques and cash-like transactions Supplementary cards $99/year 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. Your card comes with great benefits Benefits Insurance coverage Benefits Insurance coverage 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum Cardholder you receive access to lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Access includes: Use of lounges in the program regardless of the class of travel or airline you're flying Privileged access to over 1200 Airport VIP Lounges worldwide Relaxing ambience – for both you and your guests Complimentary refreshments and snacks Email, internet and conference space Primary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Supplementary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 4 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Lounge visits exceeding your complimentary benefit entitlement will be charged at the prevailing retail rate which can be found at https://www.prioritypass.com/join-prioritypass To take advantage of this benefit, each Cardholder (primary and supplementary) needs to enrol for the Priority Pass membership separately. In order to apply for a Priority Pass go to prioritypass.com/scotiabankplatinum and provide code Scotia1 for primary cardholder and code Scotia2 for supplementary cardholder. No foreign transaction fees 7 You will not be charged a Foreign Currency Conversion mark-up on foreign currency purchases whether you make them online or outside of Canada. Only the exchange rate applies. Get ready to take off with Scene+ Travel 2 With Scene+ Travel, you can earn 3 Scene+ points per Canadian dollar (CAD$) spent on hotel and car rental bookings made through Scene+ Travel using your Scotiabank American Express Card. Points can be redeemed on the total value of Things to do, hotel or car rental booking purchases (including taxes and fees) made through Scene+ Travel. You can access a range of flexible options when it comes to booking and redeeming for travel purchases.2 You can choose to book online or over the phone. To book online: Log in to your Scene+ account at sceneplus.ca Plan your trip Book your travel with points, your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card, or a combination of both Apply Scene+ Points to Travel 8 With Scene+, you have the flexibility to make your own travel arrangements at any travel provider, site or operator that you choose, and then select the “Apply Points to Travel” option to redeem points to cover off your trip costs within 12 months of the date of the travel purchase. Book eligible travel using your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card or other Scotia credit card that earns Scene+ points. Wait for your travel purchase to be posted to your Card. Log into sceneplus.ca , and redeem your Scene+ points towards the travel purchase8. To learn more on how to apply Scene+ points to Travel, call 1-866-586-2805 or visit sceneplus.ca . Beyond travel rewards Treat yourself or your loved ones with rewarding experiences and exclusive offers by Scene+ (Shopping and gift cards, Dining, Entertainment, Points for credit). Redeeming is easy. Shopping and gift cards - Redeem for the latest in tech through the Apple and Best Buy catalogues, and for gift cards at more than 60 national retailers. Dining - Redeem points at over 800+ restaurant partners including Swiss Chalet, Harvey’s, Montana’s and more. Entertainment - Redeem points at Cineplex Theatres^, Cineplex Store^, The Rec Room^ and Playdium^. Points for credit - Use the ‘Points for Credit’ option to receive a statement credit on your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card. Remember to review the Scene+ Program Terms and Conditions available on scene.ca/sceneplus for full details about these program benefits. For more information about all the ways you can redeem your points or about the Scene+ Program, visit scene.ca/sceneplus or call 1-866-586-2805. Enjoy premium concierge services 3 For everything from restaurant reservations to show tickets to finding the perfect birthday gift, your full-service travel and lifestyle Concierge Service is happy to assist, 24/7. Amex Experiences Amex Experiences 9 includes: Front Of The Line Presale Tickets or reservations to some of the most in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants and special events, often before the general public. Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets gets you access to a block of great seats reserved for Cardmembers even after shows are on sale to the public. Special Offers & Experiences for all Cardmembers - enjoy a variety of special Entertainment offers and events created for Cardmembers. Sign up for e-Updates Premium Lifestyle Experiences 15 Your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card gives you access to an array of incredible experiences. For the evolved palate Access to culinary experiences featuring the world’s greatest chefs including private group dinners, cooking classes, and culinary apprenticeships. Travel in style and luxury Enjoy a variety of special offers and discounts along your travel journey. With access to discounted bookings, car rental perks, and curated hotel offerings, travel has never been easier. The best of entertainment Enjoy a variety of special offers and events created for Cardmembers. From advance screenings of blockbuster movies, music and theatre packages, it’s easy to have an experience you’ll never forget. Make everyday more premium Access lifestyle benefits to get the most out of life. Platinum benefits can improve life’s everyday moments, from elevating your golf game to exploring the latest fashion trends with top designers. Amex Offers † Make every day more rewarding with Amex Offers † With offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, there’s something for everyone. Adding offers to your card is quick, easy, and best of all, incredibly rewarding. 14 Register your Card Be a Hertz #1 Club Gold Member Enjoy speedier service, less paperwork, and other special privileges and benefits at over 8,500 locations across 147 countries. Save time at the checkout Tap your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card or your smartphone for quick easy payments. Pay faster Apple Pay – The easy, secure, and private way to pay with your eligible Scotiabank credit cards 11 . Insurance coverage available with your Card Take advantage of all the ways a Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card adds to your life. Travel Emergency Medical Insurance 12 Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 31 consecutive days and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 10 consecutive days. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardmember (cardmember includes the primary cardmember and any supplemental cardmember), you, your spouse and your dependent children are each eligible for up to $2 million in emergency medical coverage if sudden and unexpected illness or accidental injury should occur while travelling outside your province or territory of residence in Canada. Coverage includes eligible expenses for hospital care, nursing care, prescription drugs, licensed ambulances and physicians' and surgeons' fees, as well as other eligible medical services and supplies. The date of departure is counted as the first day. This benefit is subject to an exclusion for pre-existing medical conditions. If you are under age 65 and are travelling for more than 31 days or if you are age 65 and older and travelling for more than 10 days, you may choose to purchase additional days from the insurer prior to your departure date by calling 1-877-222-7342. You will receive a separate Certificate of Insurance if you choose to purchase this coverage. Certificate of Insurance Trip Cancellation / Trip Interruption Insurance 12 Protect your travel investment with trip cancellation and trip interruption insurance at no extra cost when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your Card. You, your spouse and your dependent children are eligible for up to $2,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum $10,000 per trip) for trip cancellation benefits and for up to $5,000 per person for travel expenses (maximum $25,000 per trip) for trip interruption when you charge at least 75% of such trip expenses to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and are forced to cancel or interrupt your trip for medical or non-medical causes. Coverage provides reimbursement of non-refundable eligible trip costs and additional charges for ticketing changes. Certificate of Insurance Flight Delay Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of the full ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and you’ll be eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses such as hotel accommodations, meals and other emergency items. You may be reimbursed for eligible necessary and reasonable living expenses incurred during the period of a delayed flight or missed connection which lasts four hours or more to a limit of $1,000 per insured person on the same trip. Certificate of Insurance Rental Car Collision Loss/Damage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your eligible rental car to your Card and you’re automatically insured if your rental is damaged or stolen. You are automatically covered by Collision Loss/Damage Insurance when you rent a vehicle in your name, decline the agency's collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver (or similar provision) and use your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card to pay for the entire cost of the rental. If your rental car is damaged or stolen you are covered for the amount that you are liable to the Rental Agency up to the actual cash value of the vehicle. Note that the rental period cannot exceed 48 consecutive days and vehicles costing over $65,000 are not covered. Certificate of Insurance Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your airplane, train, bus or cruise ship tickets to your Card. If your checked luggage is delayed or lost – you’re covered. When you purchase common carrier tickets with your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you are eligible for coverage against the loss or the delay of your checked luggage. The lost luggage benefit is limited to the lesser of the value of the covered luggage or the actual replacement cost of the lost or stolen covered luggage, to a combined maximum of $1,000. The delayed luggage benefit is limited to $1,000 for all insured persons on the same trip for the cost of replacing eligible essential items if your checked luggage is not delivered within four (4) hours from your time of arrival at your final destination. Certificate of Insurance Travel Accident Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of your ticket cost to your Card and you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment. You, your spouse and eligible dependent children will be automatically insured against accidental loss of life, or dismemberment – up to a maximum of $500,000 (to a maximum of $1,000,000 per occurrence). Coverage is in place while occupying a common carrier for which you have charged at least 75% of the ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, and which is licensed to carry passengers such as airplanes, cruise ships, trains or buses. Certificate of Insurance Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance 12 Use your Card to pay for your stay at any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S. When you check into any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S., and charge your stay to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you and your spouse and dependent children travelling with you will be eligible for coverage against theft of your covered personal property if your room is broken into. Should your claim exceed the amount reimbursable by the hotel, and/or any applicable insurance protection, your coverage picks up the balance, up to a maximum of $1,000. Certificate of Insurance Mobile Device Insurance 12 You may have Mobile Device Insurance for new cell phones, smartphones, or tablets purchased on or after July 1, 2022, when you charge the full cost of your new mobile device to your Card, or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your Card when you fund such purchase through a plan. You may be covered for up to $1,000 in the event your cell phone, smartphone, or tablet is lost, stolen, accidentally damaged, or experiences mechanical failure. Certificate of Insurance For claim forms and answers to Frequently Asked Questions visit our partner's site . Shop with added coverage Added coverage means you can shop with confidence anywhere around the world. Purchase Security & Extended Warranty Protection 12 Most items purchased with your Card are insured against theft, loss or damage for 120 days from the purchase date and the manufacturer’s warranty is doubled for up to one year. Most items purchased anywhere in the world are automatically insured against theft, loss or damage as long as the full cost of the item is charged to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card. Coverage extends for the first 120 days from the date of purchase, is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. When you charge the full cost of most items to your Card, extended warranty coverage doubles the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to two years. Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price. Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase.
Eligibility: Not available
Personal Income Requirement: Not available
Household Income Requirement: Not available
FX Fee: Not available
Lounge Access: Not available
Insurance Summary: Not available

Supplementary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 4 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Lounge visits exceeding your complimentary benefit entitlement will be charged at the prevailing retail rate which can be found at https://www.prioritypass.com/join-prioritypass To take advantage of this benefit, each Cardholder (primary and supplementary) needs to enrol for the Priority Pass membership separately. In order to apply for a Priority Pass go to prioritypass.com/scotiabankplatinum and provide code Scotia1 for primary cardholder and code Scotia2 for supplementary cardholder. No foreign transaction fees 7 You will not be charged a Foreign Currency Conversion mark-up on foreign currency purchases whether you make them online or outside of Canada. Only the exchange rate applies. Get ready to take off with Scene+ Travel 2 With Scene+ Travel, you can earn 3 Scene+ points per Canadian dollar (CAD$) spent on hotel and car rental bookings made through Scene+ Travel using your Scotiabank American Express Card. Points can be redeemed on the total value of Things to do, hotel or car rental booking purchases (including taxes and fees) made through Scene+ Travel. You can access a range of flexible options when it comes to booking and redeeming for travel purchases.2 You can choose to book online or over the phone. To book online: Log in to your Scene+ account at sceneplus.ca Plan your trip Book your travel with points, your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card, or a combination of both Apply Scene+ Points to Travel 8 With Scene+, you have the flexibility to make your own travel arrangements at any travel provider, site or operator that you choose, and then select the “Apply Points to Travel” option to redeem points to cover off your trip costs within 12 months of the date of the travel purchase. Book eligible travel using your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card or other Scotia credit card that earns Scene+ points. Wait for your travel purchase to be posted to your Card. Log into sceneplus.ca , and redeem your Scene+ points towards the travel purchase8. To learn more on how to apply Scene+ points to Travel, call 1-866-586-2805 or visit sceneplus.ca . Beyond travel rewards Treat yourself or your loved ones with rewarding experiences and exclusive offers by Scene+ (Shopping and gift cards, Dining, Entertainment, Points for credit). Redeeming is easy. Shopping and gift cards - Redeem for the latest in tech through the Apple and Best Buy catalogues, and for gift cards at more than 60 national retailers. Dining - Redeem points at over 800+ restaurant partners including Swiss Chalet, Harvey’s, Montana’s and more. Entertainment - Redeem points at Cineplex Theatres^, Cineplex Store^, The Rec Room^ and Playdium^. Points for credit - Use the ‘Points for Credit’ option to receive a statement credit on your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card. Remember to review the Scene+ Program Terms and Conditions available on scene.ca/sceneplus for full details about these program benefits. For more information about all the ways you can redeem your points or about the Scene+ Program, visit scene.ca/sceneplus or call 1-866-586-2805. Enjoy premium concierge services 3 For everything from restaurant reservations to show tickets to finding the perfect birthday gift, your full-service travel and lifestyle Concierge Service is happy to assist, 24/7. Amex Experiences Amex Experiences 9 includes: Front Of The Line Presale Tickets or reservations to some of the most in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants and special events, often before the general public. Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets gets you access to a block of great seats reserved for Cardmembers even after shows are on sale to the public. Special Offers & Experiences for all Cardmembers - enjoy a variety of special Entertainment offers and events created for Cardmembers. Sign up for e-Updates Premium Lifestyle Experiences 15 Your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card gives you access to an array of incredible experiences. For the evolved palate Access to culinary experiences featuring the world’s greatest chefs including private group dinners, cooking classes, and culinary apprenticeships. Travel in style and luxury Enjoy a variety of special offers and discounts along your travel journey. With access to discounted bookings, car rental perks, and curated hotel offerings, travel has never been easier. The best of entertainment Enjoy a variety of special offers and events created for Cardmembers. From advance screenings of blockbuster movies, music and theatre packages, it’s easy to have an experience you’ll never forget. Make everyday more premium Access lifestyle benefits to get the most out of life. Platinum benefits can improve life’s everyday moments, from elevating your golf game to exploring the latest fashion trends with top designers. Amex Offers † Make every day more rewarding with Amex Offers † With offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, there’s something for everyone. Adding offers to your card is quick, easy, and best of all, incredibly rewarding. 14 Register your Card Be a Hertz #1 Club Gold Member Enjoy speedier service, less paperwork, and other special privileges and benefits at over 8,500 locations across 147 countries. Save time at the checkout Tap your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card or your smartphone for quick easy payments. Pay faster Apple Pay – The easy, secure, and private way to pay with your eligible Scotiabank credit cards 11 . Insurance coverage available with your Card Take advantage of all the ways a Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card adds to your life. Travel Emergency Medical Insurance 12 Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 31 consecutive days and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 10 consecutive days. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardmember (cardmember includes the primary cardmember and any supplemental cardmember), you, your spouse and your dependent children are each eligible for up to $2 million in emergency medical coverage if sudden and unexpected illness or accidental injury should occur while travelling outside your province or territory of residence in Canada. Coverage includes eligible expenses for hospital care, nursing care, prescription drugs, licensed ambulances and physicians' and surgeons' fees, as well as other eligible medical services and supplies. The date of departure is counted as the first day. This benefit is subject to an exclusion for pre-existing medical conditions. If you are under age 65 and are travelling for more than 31 days or if you are age 65 and older and travelling for more than 10 days, you may choose to purchase additional days from the insurer prior to your departure date by calling 1-877-222-7342. You will receive a separate Certificate of Insurance if you choose to purchase this coverage. Certificate of Insurance Trip Cancellation / Trip Interruption Insurance 12 Protect your travel investment with trip cancellation and trip interruption insurance at no extra cost when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your Card. You, your spouse and your dependent children are eligible for up to $2,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum $10,000 per trip) for trip cancellation benefits and for up to $5,000 per person for travel expenses (maximum $25,000 per trip) for trip interruption when you charge at least 75% of such trip expenses to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and are forced to cancel or interrupt your trip for medical or non-medical causes. Coverage provides reimbursement of non-refundable eligible trip costs and additional charges for ticketing changes. Certificate of Insurance Flight Delay Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of the full ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and you’ll be eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses such as hotel accommodations, meals and other emergency items. You may be reimbursed for eligible necessary and reasonable living expenses incurred during the period of a delayed flight or missed connection which lasts four hours or more to a limit of $1,000 per insured person on the same trip. Certificate of Insurance Rental Car Collision Loss/Damage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your eligible rental car to your Card and you’re automatically insured if your rental is damaged or stolen. You are automatically covered by Collision Loss/Damage Insurance when you rent a vehicle in your name, decline the agency's collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver (or similar provision) and use your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card to pay for the entire cost of the rental. If your rental car is damaged or stolen you are covered for the amount that you are liable to the Rental Agency up to the actual cash value of the vehicle. Note that the rental period cannot exceed 48 consecutive days and vehicles costing over $65,000 are not covered. Certificate of Insurance Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your airplane, train, bus or cruise ship tickets to your Card. If your checked luggage is delayed or lost – you’re covered. When you purchase common carrier tickets with your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you are eligible for coverage against the loss or the delay of your checked luggage. The lost luggage benefit is limited to the lesser of the value of the covered luggage or the actual replacement cost of the lost or stolen covered luggage, to a combined maximum of $1,000. The delayed luggage benefit is limited to $1,000 for all insured persons on the same trip for the cost of replacing eligible essential items if your checked luggage is not delivered within four (4) hours from your time of arrival at your final destination. Certificate of Insurance Travel Accident Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of your ticket cost to your Card and you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment. You, your spouse and eligible dependent children will be automatically insured against accidental loss of life, or dismemberment – up to a maximum of $500,000 (to a maximum of $1,000,000 per occurrence). Coverage is in place while occupying a common carrier for which you have charged at least 75% of the ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, and which is licensed to carry passengers such as airplanes, cruise ships, trains or buses. Certificate of Insurance Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance 12 Use your Card to pay for your stay at any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S. When you check into any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S., and charge your stay to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you and your spouse and dependent children travelling with you will be eligible for coverage against theft of your covered personal property if your room is broken into. Should your claim exceed the amount reimbursable by the hotel, and/or any applicable insurance protection, your coverage picks up the balance, up to a maximum of $1,000. Certificate of Insurance Mobile Device Insurance 12 You may have Mobile Device Insurance for new cell phones, smartphones, or tablets purchased on or after July 1, 2022, when you charge the full cost of your new mobile device to your Card, or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your Card when you fund such purchase through a plan. You may be covered for up to $1,000 in the event your cell phone, smartphone, or tablet is lost, stolen, accidentally damaged, or experiences mechanical failure. Certificate of Insurance For claim forms and answers to Frequently Asked Questions visit our partner's site . Shop with added coverage Added coverage means you can shop with confidence anywhere around the world. Purchase Security & Extended Warranty Protection 12 Most items purchased with your Card are insured against theft, loss or damage for 120 days from the purchase date and the manufacturer’s warranty is doubled for up to one year. Most items purchased anywhere in the world are automatically insured against theft, loss or damage as long as the full cost of the item is charged to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card. Coverage extends for the first 120 days from the date of purchase, is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. When you charge the full cost of most items to your Card, extended warranty coverage doubles the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to two years. Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price. Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase.

You, your spouse and your dependent children are eligible for up to $2,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum $10,000 per trip) for trip cancellation benefits and for up to $5,000 per person for travel expenses (maximum $25,000 per trip) for trip interruption when you charge at least 75% of such trip expenses to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and are forced to cancel or interrupt your trip for medical or non-medical causes. Coverage provides reimbursement of non-refundable eligible trip costs and additional charges for ticketing changes. Certificate of Insurance Flight Delay Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of the full ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and you’ll be eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses such as hotel accommodations, meals and other emergency items. You may be reimbursed for eligible necessary and reasonable living expenses incurred during the period of a delayed flight or missed connection which lasts four hours or more to a limit of $1,000 per insured person on the same trip. Certificate of Insurance Rental Car Collision Loss/Damage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your eligible rental car to your Card and you’re automatically insured if your rental is damaged or stolen. You are automatically covered by Collision Loss/Damage Insurance when you rent a vehicle in your name, decline the agency's collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver (or similar provision) and use your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card to pay for the entire cost of the rental. If your rental car is damaged or stolen you are covered for the amount that you are liable to the Rental Agency up to the actual cash value of the vehicle. Note that the rental period cannot exceed 48 consecutive days and vehicles costing over $65,000 are not covered. Certificate of Insurance Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your airplane, train, bus or cruise ship tickets to your Card. If your checked luggage is delayed or lost – you’re covered. When you purchase common carrier tickets with your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you are eligible for coverage against the loss or the delay of your checked luggage. The lost luggage benefit is limited to the lesser of the value of the covered luggage or the actual replacement cost of the lost or stolen covered luggage, to a combined maximum of $1,000. The delayed luggage benefit is limited to $1,000 for all insured persons on the same trip for the cost of replacing eligible essential items if your checked luggage is not delivered within four (4) hours from your time of arrival at your final destination. Certificate of Insurance Travel Accident Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of your ticket cost to your Card and you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment. You, your spouse and eligible dependent children will be automatically insured against accidental loss of life, or dismemberment – up to a maximum of $500,000 (to a maximum of $1,000,000 per occurrence). Coverage is in place while occupying a common carrier for which you have charged at least 75% of the ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, and which is licensed to carry passengers such as airplanes, cruise ships, trains or buses. Certificate of Insurance Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance 12 Use your Card to pay for your stay at any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S. When you check into any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S., and charge your stay to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you and your spouse and dependent children travelling with you will be eligible for coverage against theft of your covered personal property if your room is broken into. Should your claim exceed the amount reimbursable by the hotel, and/or any applicable insurance protection, your coverage picks up the balance, up to a maximum of $1,000. Certificate of Insurance Mobile Device Insurance 12 You may have Mobile Device Insurance for new cell phones, smartphones, or tablets purchased on or after July 1, 2022, when you charge the full cost of your new mobile device to your Card, or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your Card when you fund such purchase through a plan. You may be covered for up to $1,000 in the event your cell phone, smartphone, or tablet is lost, stolen, accidentally damaged, or experiences mechanical failure. Certificate of Insurance For claim forms and answers to Frequently Asked Questions visit our partner's site . Shop with added coverage Added coverage means you can shop with confidence anywhere around the world. Purchase Security & Extended Warranty Protection 12 Most items purchased with your Card are insured against theft, loss or damage for 120 days from the purchase date and the manufacturer’s warranty is doubled for up to one year. Most items purchased anywhere in the world are automatically insured against theft, loss or damage as long as the full cost of the item is charged to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card. Coverage extends for the first 120 days from the date of purchase, is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. When you charge the full cost of most items to your Card, extended warranty coverage doubles the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to two years. Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price. Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase.
Apply Link: https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/personal/credit-cards/american-express/platinum-card.html

Entertainment - Redeem points at Cineplex Theatres^, Cineplex Store^, The Rec Room^ and Playdium^. Points for credit - Use the ‘Points for Credit’ option to receive a statement credit on your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card. For more information about all the ways you can redeem your points or about the Scene+ Program, visit scene.ca/sceneplus or call 1-866-586-2805. Special Offers & Experiences for all Cardmembers - enjoy a variety of special Entertainment offers and events created for Cardmembers. Certificate of Insurance Travel Accident Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of your ticket cost to your Card and you’re insured against accidental loss of life or dismemberment. You, your spouse and eligible dependent children will be automatically insured against accidental loss of life, or dismemberment – up to a maximum of $500,000 (to a maximum of $1,000,000 per occurrence). Coverage is in place while occupying a common carrier for which you have charged at least 75% of the ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, and which is licensed to carry passengers such as airplanes, cruise ships, trains or buses. Certificate of Insurance Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance 12 Use your Card to pay for your stay at any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S. When you check into any hotel or motel in Canada or the U.S., and charge your stay to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card, you and your spouse and dependent children travelling with you will be eligible for coverage against theft of your covered personal property if your room is broken into. Should your claim exceed the amount reimbursable by the hotel, and/or any applicable insurance protection, your coverage picks up the balance, up to a maximum of $1,000. Certificate of Insurance Mobile Device Insurance 12 You may have Mobile Device Insurance for new cell phones, smartphones, or tablets purchased on or after July 1, 2022, when you charge the full cost of your new mobile device to your Card, or charge all of your wireless bill payments for such device to your Card when you fund such purchase through a plan. You may be covered for up to $1,000 in the event your cell phone, smartphone, or tablet is lost, stolen, accidentally damaged, or experiences mechanical failure. Certificate of Insurance For claim forms and answers to Frequently Asked Questions visit our partner's site . Shop with added coverage Added coverage means you can shop with confidence anywhere around the world. Purchase Security & Extended Warranty Protection 12 Most items purchased with your Card are insured against theft, loss or damage for 120 days from the purchase date and the manufacturer’s warranty is doubled for up to one year. Most items purchased anywhere in the world are automatically insured against theft, loss or damage as long as the full cost of the item is charged to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card. Coverage extends for the first 120 days from the date of purchase, is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost or original purchase price, and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. When you charge the full cost of most items to your Card, extended warranty coverage doubles the original manufacturer’s warranty for up to two years. Coverage is limited to the lesser of the repair cost, replacement cost, or original purchase price. Items covered by a manufacturer’s warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase.

Welcome Bonus: Earn up to $2,500 in value in the first 14 months, including up to 80,000 4 bonus Scene+ points . Offer details Fees, rates & other information 5 Annual fee $399 Minimum credit limit $10,000 Purchase interest rate 9.99% Cash advance rate 9.99% Including balance transfers, Scotia Credit Card Cheques and cash-like transactions Supplementary cards $99/year 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. Your card comes with great benefits Benefits Insurance coverage Benefits Insurance coverage 10 Complimentary airport lounge access 6 Be confident that you’ll have a place to relax or catch up on business. Enjoy complimentary lounge access with Priority Pass and Plaza Premium lounges with access to over 1200+ VIP lounges around the world. You must present your Priority Pass Membership Card (or Digital Membership Card) to enter lounges accessible through Priority Pass and present your Scotiabank American Express Platinum card to access the Plaza Premium lounges. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum Cardholder you receive access to lounges in more than 100 countries and 300 cities worldwide. Access includes: Use of lounges in the program regardless of the class of travel or airline you're flying Privileged access to over 1200 Airport VIP Lounges worldwide Relaxing ambience – for both you and your guests Complimentary refreshments and snacks Email, internet and conference space Primary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 10 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Supplementary Cardholders receive complimentary membership plus 4 free visits per year from the date of enrolment. Lounge visits exceeding your complimentary benefit entitlement will be charged at the prevailing retail rate which can be found at https://www.prioritypass.com/join-prioritypass To take advantage of this benefit, each Cardholder (primary and supplementary) needs to enrol for the Priority Pass membership separately. In order to apply for a Priority Pass go to prioritypass.com/scotiabankplatinum and provide code Scotia1 for primary cardholder and code Scotia2 for supplementary cardholder. No foreign transaction fees 7 You will not be charged a Foreign Currency Conversion mark-up on foreign currency purchases whether you make them online or outside of Canada. Only the exchange rate applies. Get ready to take off with Scene+ Travel 2 With Scene+ Travel, you can earn 3 Scene+ points per Canadian dollar (CAD$) spent on hotel and car rental bookings made through Scene+ Travel using your Scotiabank American Express Card. Points can be redeemed on the total value of Things to do, hotel or car rental booking purchases (including taxes and fees) made through Scene+ Travel. You can access a range of flexible options when it comes to booking and redeeming for travel purchases.2 You can choose to book online or over the phone. To book online: Log in to your Scene+ account at sceneplus.ca Plan your trip Book your travel with points, your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card, or a combination of both Apply Scene+ Points to Travel 8 With Scene+, you have the flexibility to make your own travel arrangements at any travel provider, site or operator that you choose, and then select the “Apply Points to Travel” option to redeem points to cover off your trip costs within 12 months of the date of the travel purchase. Book eligible travel using your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card or other Scotia credit card that earns Scene+ points. Wait for your travel purchase to be posted to your Card. Log into sceneplus.ca , and redeem your Scene+ points towards the travel purchase8. To learn more on how to apply Scene+ points to Travel, call 1-866-586-2805 or visit sceneplus.ca . Beyond travel rewards Treat yourself or your loved ones with rewarding experiences and exclusive offers by Scene+ (Shopping and gift cards, Dining, Entertainment, Points for credit). Redeeming is easy. Shopping and gift cards - Redeem for the latest in tech through the Apple and Best Buy catalogues, and for gift cards at more than 60 national retailers. Dining - Redeem points at over 800+ restaurant partners including Swiss Chalet, Harvey’s, Montana’s and more. Entertainment - Redeem points at Cineplex Theatres^, Cineplex Store^, The Rec Room^ and Playdium^. Points for credit - Use the ‘Points for Credit’ option to receive a statement credit on your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card. Remember to review the Scene+ Program Terms and Conditions available on scene.ca/sceneplus for full details about these program benefits. For more information about all the ways you can redeem your points or about the Scene+ Program, visit scene.ca/sceneplus or call 1-866-586-2805. Enjoy premium concierge services 3 For everything from restaurant reservations to show tickets to finding the perfect birthday gift, your full-service travel and lifestyle Concierge Service is happy to assist, 24/7. Amex Experiences Amex Experiences 9 includes: Front Of The Line Presale Tickets or reservations to some of the most in-demand concerts, theatre productions, restaurants and special events, often before the general public. Front Of The Line Reserved Tickets gets you access to a block of great seats reserved for Cardmembers even after shows are on sale to the public. Special Offers & Experiences for all Cardmembers - enjoy a variety of special Entertainment offers and events created for Cardmembers. Sign up for e-Updates Premium Lifestyle Experiences 15 Your Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card gives you access to an array of incredible experiences. For the evolved palate Access to culinary experiences featuring the world’s greatest chefs including private group dinners, cooking classes, and culinary apprenticeships. Travel in style and luxury Enjoy a variety of special offers and discounts along your travel journey. With access to discounted bookings, car rental perks, and curated hotel offerings, travel has never been easier. The best of entertainment Enjoy a variety of special offers and events created for Cardmembers. From advance screenings of blockbuster movies, music and theatre packages, it’s easy to have an experience you’ll never forget. Make everyday more premium Access lifestyle benefits to get the most out of life. Platinum benefits can improve life’s everyday moments, from elevating your golf game to exploring the latest fashion trends with top designers. Amex Offers † Make every day more rewarding with Amex Offers † With offers for shopping, dining, travel, and more, there’s something for everyone. Adding offers to your card is quick, easy, and best of all, incredibly rewarding. 14 Register your Card Be a Hertz #1 Club Gold Member Enjoy speedier service, less paperwork, and other special privileges and benefits at over 8,500 locations across 147 countries. Save time at the checkout Tap your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card or your smartphone for quick easy payments. Pay faster Apple Pay – The easy, secure, and private way to pay with your eligible Scotiabank credit cards 11 . Insurance coverage available with your Card Take advantage of all the ways a Scotiabank Platinum American Express Card adds to your life. Travel Emergency Medical Insurance 12 Coverage is provided for eligible persons under age 65 for up to 31 consecutive days and for eligible persons age 65 and older for up to 10 consecutive days. As a Scotiabank American Express Platinum cardmember (cardmember includes the primary cardmember and any supplemental cardmember), you, your spouse and your dependent children are each eligible for up to $2 million in emergency medical coverage if sudden and unexpected illness or accidental injury should occur while travelling outside your province or territory of residence in Canada. Coverage includes eligible expenses for hospital care, nursing care, prescription drugs, licensed ambulances and physicians' and surgeons' fees, as well as other eligible medical services and supplies. The date of departure is counted as the first day. This benefit is subject to an exclusion for pre-existing medical conditions. If you are under age 65 and are travelling for more than 31 days or if you are age 65 and older and travelling for more than 10 days, you may choose to purchase additional days from the insurer prior to your departure date by calling 1-877-222-7342. You will receive a separate Certificate of Insurance if you choose to purchase this coverage. Certificate of Insurance Trip Cancellation / Trip Interruption Insurance 12 Protect your travel investment with trip cancellation and trip interruption insurance at no extra cost when you charge at least 75% of your trip costs to your Card. You, your spouse and your dependent children are eligible for up to $2,500 per person for travel expenses (maximum $10,000 per trip) for trip cancellation benefits and for up to $5,000 per person for travel expenses (maximum $25,000 per trip) for trip interruption when you charge at least 75% of such trip expenses to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and are forced to cancel or interrupt your trip for medical or non-medical causes. Coverage provides reimbursement of non-refundable eligible trip costs and additional charges for ticketing changes. Certificate of Insurance Flight Delay Insurance 12 Charge at least 75% of the full ticket cost to your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card and you’ll be eligible for reimbursement of necessary expenses such as hotel accommodations, meals and other emergency items. You may be reimbursed for eligible necessary and reasonable living expenses incurred during the period of a delayed flight or missed connection which lasts four hours or more to a limit of $1,000 per insured person on the same trip. Certificate of Insurance Rental Car Collision Loss/Damage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your eligible rental car to your Card and you’re automatically insured if your rental is damaged or stolen. You are automatically covered by Collision Loss/Damage Insurance when you rent a vehicle in your name, decline the agency's collision damage waiver or loss damage waiver (or similar provision) and use your Scotiabank American Express Platinum Card to pay for the entire cost of the rental. If your rental car is damaged or stolen you are covered for the amount that you are liable to the Rental Agency up to the actual cash value of the vehicle. Note that the rental period cannot exceed 48 consecutive days and vehicles costing over $65,000 are not covered. Certificate of Insurance Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 12 Charge the full cost of your airplane, train, bus or cruise ship tickets to your Card. If your checked luggage is delayed or lost – you’re covered. raw_text: benefits Benefits Benefits Earn 1% cash back on all eligible gas station, grocery store, drug store purchases and recurring payments. 1 Earn 0.5% cash back on all other eligible purchases. 1 Make the most of your credit card Consolidate all your current recurring payments on your card and turn them into cash back rewards! Recurring Payments Recurring payments typically apply to purchases for subscriptions, telecommunication, insurance, gym memberships etc. Not all merchants offer recurring payments for these purchases. Please check with your merchant to see if they offer recurring payments on Mastercard cards. Save time at the checkout Make everyday purchases quickly and safely with just a tap of your contactless-enabled Mastercard or device. Whether you're shopping in-store or online, your Mastercard contactless card is the quick, convenient and secure way to purchase everything on your list. Pay faster Mastercard contactless Tap & Go - Shopping can be so much faster and easier when you don't have to swipe, insert, key-in, or sign at checkout. And forget about fumbling for cash; there's no need. Simply tap your Mastercard contactless card on the contactless terminal and then go. Signature or PIN is not required for Contactless transactions of CAD $100 or less at participating merchants Save on car rentals 4 As a Scotia Momentum Mastercard Cardholder, you can save up to 25% off base rates at participating AVIS locations and at participating Budget locations in Canada and the U.S. when you pay with your Scotia Momentum Mastercard Credit Card. Save on car rentals 4 AVIS reservations may be made online at avis.com/scotiabankmomentumMC or by calling 1-800-TRY AVIS (879-2847). Please quote AVIS worldwide discount number C030404. Budget Reservations may be made online at Budget.com/scotiabankmomentumMC or by calling 1-800-268-8900. Please quote Budget Corporate Discount number A363305. Costco † Wholesale Mastercard is the only credit card accepted at Costco warehouses in Canada. Get access to exciting experiences with Mastercard As a Scotia Momentum Mastercard credit card cardholder, your card gives you access to handpicked experiences from Mastercard in cities around

raw_text: benefits Benefits Insurance coverage Benefits Insurance coverage Save on car rentals As a Scotiabank U.S. Dollar Visa Cardholder, you can save up to 25% off base rates at participating AVIS and Budget locations in Canada and the U.S. when you pay with your Scotiabank U.S. Dollar Visa card. AVIS reservations may be made online at avis.com/scotiabankUSvisa or by calling 1-800-TRY-AVIS (879-2847) . Please quote AVIS worldwide discount number C030309. Budget Reservations may be made online at budget.com/scotiabankUSvisa or by calling 1-800-268-8900 . Please quote Budget Corporate Discount number A363318. Purchase security and extended warranty ‡ Now you can enjoy the freedom to make U.S. dollar purchases in U.S. funds without the worry of currency conversion fees or exchange rate fluctuations. Whether you're travelling south of the border or shopping online from U.S. retailers, your Scotiabank U.S. Dollar Visa Card is the perfect companion. Most personal items purchased anywhere in the world are automatically insured against theft, loss or damage as long as the full cost of the item is charged to your Scotiabank U.S. Dollar Visa Card. Coverage extends for the first 90 days from the date of purchase and is in excess of any other insurance coverage. When you use your Scotiabank U.S. Dollar Visa Card to purchase most personal items and charge the full cost of the item to your card, extended warranty coverage doubles the original manufacturer's warranty for up to one additional year. Items covered by a manufacturer's warranty repair services of five years or more must be registered within the first year of purchase. There is a maximum lifetime liability of $60,000 under the Purchase Security and Extended Warranty coverages. Certificate of Purchase Security Insurance (46K) Added convenience Pay your Visa statement with U.S. dollars directly from your Scotia U.S. Dollar Daily Interest Account. If you don't have one, open one in Branch, through Scotia OnLine Financial Services, or by calling 1-800-4SCOTIA. Instant cash advances Obtain cash advances at : Over 1 million ABMs around the world displaying the Visa/PLUS symbols. Or, access your Scotiabank U.S. Dollar Visa card a

Transfer your balance and save more Transfer your balance from a non-Scotiabank higher interest rate credit card to your Scotiabank Value Visa Card to save. Save on car rentals Save up to 25% off base rates at participating AVIS locations and at participating Budget locations in Canada and the US when you pay with your Scotiabank Value Visa Card. 5 To book with Avis, visit https://www.avis.com/scotiabankvaluevisa opens in a new tab or call 1-800-879-2847 . Use the AVIS worldwide discount code C030300. To book with Budget, visit https://www.budget.com/scotiabankvaluevisa opens in a new tab or call 1-800-268-8900 . Use the Budget Corporate Discount code A363310. Buy now and pay over time with Scotia SelectPay A flexible way to pay off your eligible Scotiabank credit card purchases of $100 or more, with low interest rates on your plan and no installment plan fee. § Learn about Scotia SelectPay Save time at checkout Tap your card from your mobile wallet to make quick payments. Learn about Apple Pay and Google Pay , the secure way to pay with your eligible Scotiabank credit cards. Stay connected in over 175 countries Stay connected while you travel with 10% off GigSky global mobile data plans, when you purchase with your Scotiabank Value Visa Card. 6 Expand all Collapse all Scotia Credit Card Protection (optional) This insurance helps protect your finances by helping cover your balance or monthly payments during unexpected life events, such as 7 : Death Critical Illness Hospitalization Disability Job Loss Strike or Lockout There are two different coverage bundles to choose from 7 : Basic Protection Life Benefit Critical Illness Benefit Hospitalization Benefit Comprehensive Protection Life Benefit Critical Illness Benefit Hospitalization Benefit Disability Benefit Job Loss Benefit Strike or Lockout Benefit Learn about SCCP

raw_text: Built-in benefits Everyday Insurance Expand all Collapse all Maximize your cash back Automatically earn cash back when you charge eligible recurring payments like subscriptions, insurance, and gym memberships to your card. Save on car rentals Save up to 25% off base rates at participating AVIS and Budget locations in Canada and the US when you pay with your Scotia Momentum No-Fee Visa card. 5 To book with Avis, visit avis.com/scotiabankmomentumnofee opens in a new tab or call 1-800-879-2847 . Use the AVIS worldwide discount code C030402. To book with Budget, visit budget.com/scotiabankmomentumnofee opens in a new tab or call 1-800-268-8900 . Use the Budget Corporate Discount code A363303. Buy now and pay over time with Scotia SelectPay A flexible way to pay off eligible Scotiabank credit card purchases of $100 or more, with low interest rates and no installment plan fee. 6 Learn about Scotia SelectPay. Expand all Collapse all Scotia Credit Card Protection (optional) This insurance coverage can provide you and your family financial protection by paying off your outstanding account balance or helping to cover your monthly credit card payments as a result of certain unexpected life events, such as Death, Critical Illness, Hospitalization, Disability, Job Loss or Strike or Lockout. 7 There are two different coverage bundles to choose from: Basic Protection which includes: Life benefit Critical illness benefit Hospitalization benefit Comprehensive Protection which includes: Life benefit Critical illness benefit Hospitalization benefit Disability benefit Job loss benefit Strike or lockout benefit Learn more

card_name: TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card
raw_text: TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card could be the right one for you. It comes with an earn rate of 3% in Cash Back on Grocery, Gas & Electric Vehicle Charging, Public Transit, Recurring Bill Payments, and Streaming, Digital Gaming & Media Purchases 3 , # . You also earn 1% in Cash Back on all other Purchases 5 , # . This card has travel benefits such as Travel Medical Insurance 9 as well as automotive benefits such as Emergency Road Services with the Deluxe TD Auto Club Membership 18 . How do you apply for this Cash Back credit card? You can apply for a TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card within minutes by clicking on Apply online on this page. As part of the application, you will need to share some mandatory information such as your full legal name and date of birth, your home address, phone number and email address, employment status, gross annual income and residential status. How do you earn Cash Back on this TD Cash Back Credit Card? You can earn 3% in Cash Back Dollars on Grocery, Gas & Electric Vehicle Charging, Public Transit, Recurring Bill Payments, and Streaming, Digital Gaming & Media Purchases 3 , # and 1% in Cash Back Dollars on all other purchases 5 , # . How do you redeem Cash Back dollars? Redeeming Cash Back dollars is simple and easy. You can redeem your Cash Back Dollars at anytime through EasyWeb or TD Mobile App. Your Cash Back dollars never expire as long as your account is open and in good standing with TD 6 . Find out more about our credit cards slide 1 of 3 Get started with my credit card Everything you need to know to start using your Canadian credit card. card_name: TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card
raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features Visa Infinite Benefits Complimentary Visa Infinite Concierge 8 : On-call 24 hours a day, seven days a week. The Visa Infinite Concierge can help with any Cardholder request — big or small, to help you get the most out of life whenever you travel, shop and use your Card. Call toll-free from Canada and the U.S.: 1-888-853-4458 From outside Canada and the U.S.: 1-630-350-4545. Visa Infinite Luxury Hotel Collection 9 : Receive seven exclusive benefits when you book your stay through the Visa Infinite Luxury Hotel Collection featuring over 900 of the world’s most intriguing properties. Visa Infinite Dining Series 9 : As a Visa Infinite Cardholder, you have access to exclusive gourmet events that cater to your astute tastes. The Visa Infinite Dining Series serves up culinary explorations with prized chefs and acclaimed wines. Visa Infinite Wine Country Program 9 : Show your Visa Infinite card onsite and you can experience exclusive benefits at over 95 participating wineries in British Columbia, Ontario and Sonoma Valley including discounts on wine purchases, complimentary tastings, private vineyard tours and much more. Visa Infinite Entertainment Access 9 : Get exclusive access to tickets to curated events across Canada throughout the year. Visa Infinite Cardholders can also enjoy exclusive benefits, access and offers for the Toronto International Film Festival® Visa Infinite Troon Golf 9 : Receive elevated Troon Rewards® Silver Status at over 95 courses and 10% off on green fees, merchandise and lessons at participating Troon Rewards golf courses. Automotive Benefits Free Deluxe TD Auto Club Membership 18 - Deluxe TD Auto Club membership is included at no charge with the TD Cash Back Visa Infinite* Card. You'll be covered 24 hours a day with Emergency Road Services in case something goes wrong when you are out on the road. Save with Avis Rent A Car and Budget Rent A Car - Use your Canadian TD Credit Card to save a minimum of 10% off the lowest available base rates 10 , 11 in Canada and the U.S., and a minimum of 5% off the lowest available base rates 10 , 11 internationally, on qualifying car rentals at participating Avis and Budget locations. Auto Rental Collision/Loss Damage Insurance 13 - Use your Canadian TD Credit Card to charge the full cost of a car rental to get the Collision/Loss Damage coverage at no additional cost. Travel Benefits Travel Medical Insurance 7 - Up to $2 million of coverage for the first 10 days. If you or your spouse is aged 65 or older, you are covered for the first 4 days of your trip. Additional top-up coverage is available. Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 13 - Up to $1,000 overall coverage per insured person toward the Purchase of essentials such as clothes and toiletries if your baggage is delayed more than 6 hours or lost. Emergency Travel Assistance Services 14 - Help is just a call away. Toll-free access to help in the event of a personal emergency while travelling. Top-up or Extens

card_name: TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card
raw_text: Security Visa Zero Liability - Shop online and in person securely with Visa Zero Liability and be protected in the event that unauthorized transactions are made on your Card. See your Cardholder Agreement for complete information on unauthorized transactions and your responsibilities including your responsibility to protect your PIN. Chip & PIN technology - TD Visa* Cards with Chip and PIN technology provide an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 15 - You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, which includes coverage for most eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase. Mobile Device Insurance 17 Up to $1,000 of coverage in the event of loss, theft, accidental damage, or mechanical breakdown for eligible mobile devices. Visa Secure* Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Instant Alerts. Added convenience, with TD Fraud Alerts: You can now automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD Cash Back Visa Infinite* Card, or on any Additional Cardholder's card on your Account. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile. Learn more . Click to Pay Paying online with your TD Visa

raw_text: Why should you get the TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Credit Card? If you are looking for great Cash Back credit card with travel and automotive benefits, then this TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card could be the right one for you. It comes with an earn rate of 3% in Cash Back on Grocery, Gas & Electric Vehicle Charging, Public Transit, Recurring Bill Payments, and Streaming, Digital Gaming & Media Purchases 3 , # . You also earn 1% in Cash Back on all other Purchases 5 , # . This card has travel benefits such as Travel Medical Insurance 9 as well as automotive benefits such as Emergency Road Services with the Deluxe TD Auto Club Membership 18 .

raw_text: How do you apply for this Cash Back credit card? You can apply for a TD Cash Back Visa Infinite Card within minutes by clicking on Apply online on this page. As part of the application, you will need to share some mandatory information such as your full legal name and date of birth, your home address, phone number and email address, employment status, gross annual income and residential status.

card_name: Apply for a TD Cash Back Visa Card
raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features Additional Benefits & Features TD Payment Plans - Easily turn purchases of $100 or more into manageable 6, 12 or 18 month Payment Plans. Conditions apply. Learn more . Automotive Benefits Save with Avis Rent A Car and Budget Rent A Car. Use your Canadian TD Credit Card to save a minimum of 10% off the lowest available base rates 7 , 8 in Canada and the U.S., and a minimum of 5% off the lowest available base rates 7 , 8 internationally, on qualifying car rentals at participating Avis and Budget locations. Option to Purchase TD Auto Club Membership 10 and be covered 24 hours a day for emergency roadside assistance services in case something goes wrong when you are out on the road. Security Visa Zero Liability - Shop online and in person securely with Visa Zero Liability and be protected in the event that unauthorized transactions are made on your Card. See your Cardholder Agreement for complete information on unauthorized transactions and your responsibilities including your responsibility to protect your PIN. Chip & PIN technology - TD Visa* Cards with Chip and PIN technology provide an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 6 - You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, which includes coverage for most eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase. Visa Secure* - Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Instant Alerts. Added convenience, with TD Fraud Alerts: You can now automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD Cash Back Visa* card, or on any Additional Cardholder card on your Account. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile. Learn more . Click to Pay Paying online with your TD Visa card is easy, smart and secure. Just click to pay with your TD Visa when you see this icon ( ) where Visa is accepted. Manage your credit card in the TD app Set transaction limits, block international purchases or lock your credit card. Learn more . Review the Benefit Coverages Guide for more details. Everyday Services Use Apple Pay , Google Pay or Samsung Pay wherever contactless payments are accepted These Digital Wallets are accepted in a growing number of shops, restaurants, and other retailers, making it convenient and easy to use for everyday business payments with just a tap of your device 12 . Emergency Cash Advances 9 - You can ask for an emergency Cash Advance in an amount up to $500 for your TD Cash Back Visa* Card (subject to your available credit limit). Optional benefits Optional TD Credit Card Payment Protection Plan 13 : Optional TD Credit Card Payment Protection Plan insurance products are designed to help you ma

card_name: TD Aeroplan Visa Platinum Credit Card
raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features Travel Benefits Wherever you're headed on your next trip, travel prepared with: Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 5 : Up to $1,000 of overall coverage per insured person towards the Purchase of essentials, like clothes and toiletries, if your baggage is delayed for over 6 hours or lost. Flight/Trip Delay Insurance 5 : Up to $500 in coverage per insured person if your flight/trip is delayed for over 4 hours. Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 6 : Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example, a bus, ferry, plane or train). Auto Rental Collision/Loss Damage Insurance 8 : Coverage for up to 48 consecutive days. Emergency Travel Assistance Services 9 : Help is just a call away. Toll-free access to help in the event of a personal emergency while travelling. Check your TD credit card travel insurance benefits : Learn about what travel insurance benefits are available on your TD credit card with our Credit Card Travel Insurance Verification Tool . Hotel/Motel Burglary Insurance 7 : Up to $2,500 of coverage per occurrence for eligible personal items stolen from your hotel or motel room that belong to the Cardholder on the Account and eligible family members travelling with the Cardholder. Review the Benefit Coverages Guide for more details. Additional Benefits and Features Save with Avis Rent A car and Budget Rent a Car. Use your TD® Aeroplan® Visa Platinum Card to save a minimum of 10% off the lowest available base rates 10 , 11 in Canada and the U.S., and a minimum of 5% off the lowest available base rates 10 , 11 internationally, on qualifying car rentals at participating Avis and Budget locations. Use Apple Pay , Google Pay or Samsung Pay wherever contactless payments are accepted Digital Wallets are widely accepted by plenty of shops, restaurants and other retailers, letting you make everyday purchases conveniently and securely with just a tap of your device 19 . TD Payment Plans Easily turn purchases of $100 or more into manageable 6, 12 or 18 month Payment Plans. Conditions apply. Learn more . Security Chip & PIN technology: TD Visa Cards with Chip and PIN technology provides an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). A PIN makes it much more difficult for unauthorized users to copy or access the information on your TD Credit Card. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 12 : You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, covering eligible new items you’ve purchased with your card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase. If the item comes with a manufacturer’s warranty valid in Canada, you may be entitled to double the warranty period for up to 12 additional months. Visa Secure*: Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Cash Advances: You can access a Cash Advanc

raw_text: Security Chip & PIN technology: TD Visa Cards with Chip and PIN technology provides an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). A PIN makes it much more difficult for unauthorized users to copy or access the information on your TD Credit Card. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 12 : You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, covering eligible new items you’ve purchased with your card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase. If the item comes with a manufacturer’s warranty valid in Canada, you may be entitled to double the warranty period for up to 12 additional months. Visa Secure*: Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Cash Advances: You can access a Cash Advance at over one million ATMs worldwide, at all TD branches and at select financial institutions around the world. Mobile Device Insurance 7 : Up to $1,000 of coverage in the event of loss, theft, accidental damage or mechanical breakdown for eligible mobile devices. Instant Alerts with TD Fraud Alerts 13 : You can automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD® Aeroplan® Visa Platinum Card or on any Additional Cardholder Card on your Account. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile. Learn more .

card_name: TD First Class Travel Visa Infinite Card
raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features TD Rewards Program Benefits TD First Class Travel Credit Card helps you earn big while you do all the things you normally do. And since you never slow down, the rewards can add up quickly. This lets you redeem for how and what you want with the flexibility to treat yourself with a wide variety of rewards options. Your Points are worth more when you redeem through Expedia® For TD: Search over a million flights, hotels, packages and more! When you’re ready to book, you can redeem 3 your TD Rewards Points towards your travel Purchase right away. Pay off Purchases : Redeem your points for any of your eligible past purchases on your TD Credit Card in just three clicks. It’s a quick, easy way to get the rewards you want most. Learn More Pay Down Balance: Redeem TD Rewards Points to help pay down your credit card balance. Travel Benefits Explore the travel benefits and insurance coverages included with your Card: $100 TD Travel Credit 23 Each year, you will receive one $100.00 TD Travel Credit on your first Eligible Travel Credit Purchase of $500.00 or more made with Expedia For TD and posted to the Account in a calendar year. Enjoy your time at the airport with global lounge access 30 Need a place to relax and recharge before you get on your flight? Your TD First Class Travel Visa Infinite Card lets you access 1,200+ airport lounges worldwide with the Visa Airport Companion Program 30 . Plus, pre-book your visit at participating airport lounges for extra peace of mind. Enjoy 4 complimentary lounge visits per membership year, as well as airport dining and retail discounts and offers. Travel Medical Insurance 7 Up to $2 million of coverage for the first 21 days. If you or your spouse is aged 65 or older, you are covered for the first 4 days of your trip. Additional top-up coverage is available. Flight/Trip Delay Insurance 8 Up to $500 in coverage per insured person if your flight/trip is delayed for over 4 hours. Trip Cancellation/Trip Interruption Insurance 9 For Trip Cancellation, up to $1,500 of coverage per insured person, with a maximum of $5,000 for all insured persons, and for Trip Interruption, up to $5,000 of coverage per insured person, with a maximum of $25,000 for all insured persons on the same covered trip. Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 10 Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example, a bus, ferry, plane, train, or auto rental) Emergency Travel Assistance Services 11 Help is just a call away. Toll-free access to help in the event of a personal emergency while travelling. Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 8 Up to $1,000 overall coverage per insured person toward the Purchase of essentials such as clothes and toiletries if your baggage is delayed more than 6 hours or lost. Auto Rental Collision/Loss Damage Insurance 12 Coverage up to 48 consecutive days Check your TD credit card travel insurance benefits Learn about what travel insurance benefits ar

Chip & PIN technology: TD Visa * Cards with Chip and PIN technology provide an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). A required PIN makes it much more difficult for unauthorized users to copy or access the information on your TD Credit Card. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 15 : You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, covering most eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Canadian Credit Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase. If the item comes with a manufacturer's warranty valid in Canada, you may be entitled to double the warranty period for up to 12 additional months. Visa Secure* Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Instant Alerts. Added convenience, with TD Fraud Alerts: You can now automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD First Class Travel ® Visa Infinite * Card, or on any Additional Cardholder's card on your Account. raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features TD Rewards Program Benefits The TD Rewards Program lets you earn TD Rewards Points on your everyday purchases and gives you the freedom and flexibility to redeem them how and when you want. Your Points are worth more when you redeem through Expedia® For TD : Search over a million flights, hotels, packages and more! When you’re ready to book, you can redeem 8 your TD Rewards Points towards your travel Purchase right away. Pay off Purchases: Redeem your points for any of your eligible past purchases on your TD Credit Card in just three clicks. It’s a quick, easy way to get the rewards you want most. Learn More Pay Down Balance: Redeem TD Rewards Points to help pay down your credit card balance. Travel Benefits Flight/Trip Delay Insurance 9 Up to $500 in coverage if your flight/trip is delayed more than 4 hours. Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 9 Up to $1,000 overall coverage per insured person toward the Purchase of essentials such as clothing and toiletries if your baggage is delayed more than 6 hours or lost. Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 10 Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example, a bus, ferry, plane, or train). Auto Rental Collision/ Loss Damage Insurance 14 Use your eligible Canadian TD Credit Card to charge the full cost of a car rental and get the Auto Rental Collision/Loss Damage Insurance at no additional cost Emergency Travel Assistance Services 11 Help is just a call away. raw_text: At a glance Earn TD Reward Points on all the things you normally do, whether you use your Card for groceries, dining, paying bills, public transit, streaming services or booking travel. The rewards will add up quickly so you can enhance your everyday experiences and enjoy a wide variety of rewards. Your card also allows you to enjoy: Flexibility to redeem your TD Rewards Points on a wide variety of rewards at Expedia® For TD 5 , Starbucks® and more. Mobile device insurance of up to $1000 if you lose or damage your phone 7 . Book your travel through Expedia® For TD 5 to maximize the TD Rewards Points you can earn on your travel purchases. No travel blackouts 15 , no seat restrictions 15 and no expiry 12 for your TD Rewards Points as long as your account is open and in good standing. Redeem your TD Rewards Points towards making purchases at Amazon.ca with Amazon Shop with Points. Conditions apply. See more details . Award Winning TD Credit Card Chosen as Top No annual fee Travel Rewards Credit Card by readers of Rewards Canada in 2023. #1 Every Purchase Counts slide 1 of 4 Earn 4 TD Rewards Points for every $1 you spend when you book travel through Expedia® For TD 2 , 5 , 17 Earn 3 TD Rewards Points for every $1 you spend on Groceries, Dining, and Public Transit 3 , 17 Earn 2 TD Rewards Points for every $1 you spend on Recurring Bill Payments and Streaming, Digital Gaming & Media
