card_name: TD Low Rate Visa Credit Card
raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features Automotive Features Save with Avis® Rent A Car and Budget® Rent A Car. Use your Canadian TD Credit Card to save a minimum of 10% off the lowest available base rates 7 , 8 in Canada and the U.S., and a minimum of 5% off the lowest available base rates 7 , 8 internationally, on qualifying car rentals at participating Avis and Budget locations. Option to Purchase a TD Auto Club Membership 9 and be covered 24 hours a day for emergency roadside assistance services in case something goes wrong when you are out on the road. Security Visa Zero Liability: Shop online and in person securely with Visa Zero Liability and be protected in the event that unauthorized transactions are made on your Card. See your Cardholder Agreement for complete information on unauthorized transactions and your responsibilities including your responsibility to protect your PIN. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 3 : You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, covering most eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Canadian Credit Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase. If the item comes with a manufacturer's warranty valid in Canada, you may be entitled to double the warranty period for up to 12 additional months. Chip & PIN technology: Chip & PIN technology provides an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). Visa Secure*: Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Click to Pay: Paying online with your TD Visa card is easy, smart and secure. Just click to pay with your TD Visa when you see this icon ( ) where Visa is accepted. Instant Alerts. Added convenience, with TD Fraud Alerts: You can now automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD Low Rate Visa* Card, or on any Additional Cardholder's card on your Account. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile. Learn more . Review the Benefit Coverages Guide for more details. Additional Benefits & Features TD Payment Plans Easily turn purchases of $100 or more into manageable 6, 12 or 18 month Payment Plans. Conditions apply. Learn more . Use Apple Pay , Google Pay or Samsung Pay wherever contactless payments are accepted These Digital Wallets are accepted in a growing number of shops, restaurants, and other retailers, making it convenient and easy to use for everyday business payments with just a tap of your device 6 . Everyday Services Emergency Cash Advances 10 You can ask for an emergency Cash Advance up to $500 for the TD Low Rate Visa* Card (subject to your available credit limit). Optional benefits Optional TD Credit Card Payment Protection Plan 11 : Optional TD Credit Card Payment Protection Plan insurance products are designed to help you make your TD Credit Card p

metadata.card_name: Apply for a TD U.S. Dollar Visa Card

card_name: Apply for a TD U.S. Dollar Visa Card
raw_text: More Card Benefits and Features Travel Benefits Trip Interruption Insurance 4 ‑ Up to $5,000 of coverage per insured person, to a maximum of $25,000 for all insured persons on the same trip Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 5 ‑ Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example, a bus, ferry, plane, or train) Emergency Travel Assistance Services 6 ‑ Help is just a call away. Toll-free access to help in the event of a personal emergency while travelling. Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 7 ‑ Up to $1,000 overall coverage per insured person toward the Purchase of essentials such as clothes and toiletries if your baggage is delayed more than 6 hours or lost. Review the Benefit Coverages Guide for more details. Automotive Features Save with Avis Rent A Car and Budget Rent A Car ‑ Use your Canadian TD Credit Card to save a minimum of 10% off the lowest available base rates 9 , 10 in Canada and the U.S., and a minimum of 5% off the lowest available base rates 9 , 10 internationally, on qualifying car rentals at participating Avis and Budget locations. Auto Rental Collision/Loss Damage Insurance 11 ‑ Use your Canadian TD Credit Card to charge the full cost of a car rental to get the Collision/Loss Damage coverage at no additional cost. Security Visa Zero Liability ‑ Shop online and in person securely with Visa Zero Liability and be protected in the event that unauthorized transactions are made on your Card. See your Cardholder Agreement for complete information on unauthorized transactions and your responsibilities including your responsibility to protect your PIN. Chip & PIN technology is already in use in most parts of the world and is gradually being adopted in the U.S. The microchip embedded in your Card encrypts your data, providing enhanced security against unauthorized use of your Card. Click to Pay Paying online with your TD Visa card is easy, smart and secure. Just click to pay with your TD Visa when you see this icon ( ) where Visa is accepted. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 12 – You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, which includes coverage for most eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of Purchase Instant Alerts. Added convenience, with TD Fraud Alerts: You can now automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD U.S. Dollar Visa * Card, or on any Additional Cardholder's card on your Account. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile. Learn more . Manage your credit card in the TD app Set transaction limits, block international purchases or lock your credit card. Learn more . Optional benefits Optional travel insurance: Travel Medical Insurance 14 , Trip Cancellation and Trip Interruption Insurance 15 . Learn more and get a quote . Everyday Services Us

metadata.card_name: Apply for a TD Business Travel Visa Card - TD Canada Trust

card_name: Apply for a TD Business Travel Visa Card - TD Canada Trust
raw_text: More card benefits and features TD Rewards Program benefits The TD Rewards Program lets you earn TD Rewards Points on your everyday business purchases and gives you the freedom and flexibility to redeem them how and when you want. Go Places : You can earn more TD Rewards Points when you book your business travel online with your TD Business Travel Visa Card through ExpediaForTD.com. You can also redeem 10 any earned TD Rewards Points towards that purchase at time of booking to pay for all or part of your trip. Pay off Purchases: Redeem your points for any of your eligible past purchases on your TD Credit Card in just three clicks. It’s a quick, easy way to get the rewards you want most. Learn More Amazon.ca Shop with Points Redeem your TD Rewards Points towards making business purchases at Amazon.ca to get what you want, when you want, quickly and easily. Conditions apply. Learn more about how you can redeem your points for all or just part of your purchase. Help pay down your balance: You can also redeem your TD Rewards Points to help pay down your Credit Card Account balance through EasyWeb or the TD Mobile app. Visa SavingsEdge* Program 11 Link your TD Visa Business Card to Visa SavingsEdge for free and turn your spending into savings. After linking your Card, you’ll get access to hundreds of Cashback Offers to help you save on business expenses — from gas, restaurants, business services, and more. Learn more and link Travel benefits Travel Medical Insurance 12 : Up to $2 million of coverage for the first 15 days. If you or your spouse is aged 65 or older, you have coverage for the first 4 days. Additional top-up coverage is available. Trip Cancellation/Trip Interruption Insurance 23 : For Trip Cancellation, up to $1,500 of coverage per insured person, with a maximum of $5,000 for all insured persons; and for Trip Interruption, up to $5,000 of coverage per insured person, with a maximum of $25,000 for all insured persons on the same covered trip. Flight/ Trip Delay Insurance 15 : Up to $500 in coverage if your flight/trip is delayed for longer than 4 hours. Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 13 : Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example: a bus, ferry, plane or train). Emergency Travel Assistance Services 14 : Help is just a call away. Toll-free access to help in the event of a personal emergency while travelling. Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 15 : Up to $1,000 of overall coverage per insured person toward the purchase of essentials such as clothes and toiletries, if your baggage is delayed longer than 6 hours or lost. Top-up or Extension of coverage 28 You can purchase extra days of travel medical coverage for a specific trip if you will be away for a longer period of time than what your TD Credit Card covers. Or add an additional coverage amount to your trip cancellation and trip interruption insurance if your trip cost is higher than the coverage offered on your card. Learn mo

Flight/ Trip Delay Insurance 15 : Up to $500 in coverage if your flight/trip is delayed for longer than 4 hours. Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 13 : Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example: a bus, ferry, plane or train). Emergency Travel Assistance Services 14 : Help is just a call away. Toll-free access to help in the event of a personal emergency while travelling. Delayed and Lost Baggage Insurance 15 : Up to $1,000 of overall coverage per insured person toward the purchase of essentials such as clothes and toiletries, if your baggage is delayed longer than 6 hours or lost. Top-up or Extension of coverage 28 You can purchase extra days of travel medical coverage for a specific trip if you will be away for a longer period of time than what your TD Credit Card covers. raw_text: Security Visa Zero Liability * : Shop online and in person securely with Visa Zero Liability* and be protected in the event that unauthorized transactions are made on your Card. raw_text: More card benefits and features Additional Benefits & Features Visa SavingsEdge* program 7 Link your TD Visa Business Card to Visa SavingsEdge for free and turn your spending into savings. After linking your Card, you’ll get access to hundreds of Cashback Offers to help you save on business expenses — from gas, restaurants, business services, and more. Learn more and link Redeem more flexibly with Points + Cash You have the flexibility to use points for part of your trip and use your TD® Aeroplan® Visa Business Card to pay for the rest (and earn points, too). Air Canada® travel benefits 8 Whether you book using points or cash, enjoy the following benefits on any flight operated by Air Canada®, Air Canada Rouge® or under the Air Canada Express® banner. Free First Checked Bag 4 Travel lightly through the airport and save on baggage fees. The Primary Business Cardholder 3 , Additional Cardholders, and travel companions (up to eight) travelling on the same reservation will all enjoy their first checked bag free (up to 23kg/50lb) when travel originates on an Air Canada flight. All Additional Cardholders must link their Aeroplan number to receive access to eligible Air Canada travel benefits. Maple Leaf Lounge One-Time Guest Passes 9 Relax before take-off, using your Maple Leaf Lounge guest pass. The Primary Business Cardholder will earn a pass for every $10,000 of net purchases (less any returns and credits), up to a maximum of four passes a year. Passes can be used by the Primary Business Cardholder or Additional Cardholders and their guest, at select Maple Leaf Lounges in North America with a same day ticket on a departing Air Canada flight. Reach Aeroplan Elite® Status Faster 21 Primary Business Cardholders 3 can get 1,000 SQC for every $20,000 in eligible net purchases charged to the card account, up to 25,000 SQC 21 . Complimentary upgrade to Avis® Preferred Plus 22 : Unlock one-car class rental upgrades, expedited service, dedicated phone line, parking stall and pick-up counter and more by elevating to Avis Preferred Plus. Travel benefits Wherever you're headed on your next trip, travel prepared with: Travel Medical Insurance 5 : Up to $2 million of coverage for the first 15 days. If you or your spouse is aged 65 or older, you have coverage for the first 4 days. Additional top-up coverage is available. Trip Cancellation/Trip Interruption Insurance 10 : For Trip Cancellation, up to $1,500 of coverage per insured person, with a maximum of $5,000 for all insured persons, and for Trip Interruption, up to $5,000 of coverage per insured person, with a maximum of $25,000 for all insured persons on the same covered trip. Flight/Trip Delay Insurance 11 : Up to $500 in coverage per insured person if your flight/trip is delayed for over 4 hours. Common Carrier Travel Accident Insurance 12 : Up to $500,000 of coverage for covered losses while travelling on a common carrier (for example, a bus, ferry, plane, train, or auto rental). Delayed and Lost Baggage I

raw_text: Security Chip & PIN technology : TD Visa Cards with Chip and PIN technology provide an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). A PIN makes it much more difficult for unauthorized users to copy or access the information on your TD Credit Card. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 19 : You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, covering eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of purchase. If the item comes with a manufacturer's warranty valid in Canada, you may be entitled to double the warranty period for up to 12 additional months. Visa Secure* : Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more. Mobile Device Insurance 14 : Get mobile device protection of up to $1,000 in the event of loss, theft, accidental damage or mechanical breakdown for eligible mobile devices when you use your Card to pay all of your monthly mobile bill payments and any upfront costs, or charge at least 75% of the purchase price when paying the full cost of your new mobile device up front. Instant Alerts with TD Fraud Alerts 20 : You can automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect suspicious activity on your TD® Aeroplan® Visa Business Card. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile.

raw_text: More card benefits and features Automotive features Save with Avis Rent A Car and Budget Rent A Car . Use your TD Credit Card to save a minimum of 10% of the lowest available base rates 8 , 9 in Canada and the U.S., and a minimum of 5% of the lowest available base rates 8 , 9 internationally, on qualifying car rentals at participating Avis and Budget locations. Additional Benefits & Features Visa SavingsEdge* Program 7 : Link your TD Visa Business Card to Visa SavingsEdge for free and turn your spending into savings. After linking your Card, you’ll get access to hundreds of Cashback Offers to help you save on business expenses — from gas, restaurants, business services, and more. Learn more and link Security Chip & PIN technology : TD Visa* Cards with Chip and PIN technology provide an added level of security through the use of a Personal Identification Number (PIN). A PIN makes it much more difficult for unauthorized users to copy or access the information on your TD Credit Card. Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection 5 : You automatically have access to Purchase Security and Extended Warranty Protection, covering most eligible new items you’ve purchased with your Card, should they be stolen or damaged within 90 days of purchase. If the item comes with a manufacturer’s warranty valid in Canada, you may be entitled to double the warranty period for up to 12 additional months. Visa Secure* : Visa Secure provides you with increased security and convenience when you shop online through In-app Authentication. Learn more . Instant alerts. Added convenience, with TD Fraud Alerts : You can now automatically receive TD Fraud Alerts to your mobile phone any time we suspect unusual activity on your TD Business Cash Back Visa* Card. Simply ensure that we have your current mobile phone number listed in your TD Customer Profile. Learn more . Click to Pay Paying online with your TD Visa card is easy, smart and secure. Just click to pay with your TD Visa when you see this icon ( ) where Visa is accepted. For more information, please refer to Cardholder Agreement .
